1‚Üí"""Pipeline checkpoint manager for resume capability.
     2‚Üí
     3‚ÜíSaves pipeline progress to a JSON file so that interrupted pipelines
     4‚Üícan be resumed from where they left off.
     5‚Üí"""
     6‚Üí
     7‚Üíimport json
     8‚Üíimport os
     9‚Üíimport tempfile
    10‚Üífrom datetime import datetime
    11‚Üífrom pathlib import Path
    12‚Üífrom typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Set
    13‚Üí
    14‚Üífrom loguru import logger
    15‚Üí
    16‚Üí
    17‚ÜíCHECKPOINT_DIR = Path("data/.checkpoints")
    18‚Üí
    19‚Üí
    20‚Üíclass CheckpointManager:
    21‚Üí    """Manages pipeline checkpoint save/load for resume support."""
    22‚Üí
    23‚Üí    def __init__(self, checkpoint_id: Optional[str] = None):
    24‚Üí        CHECKPOINT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    25‚Üí
    26‚Üí        if checkpoint_id:
    27‚Üí            self.checkpoint_path = CHECKPOINT_DIR / f"{checkpoint_id}.json"
    28‚Üí        else:
    29‚Üí            # Generate ID from timestamp
    30‚Üí            ts = datetime.utcnow().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
    31‚Üí            self.checkpoint_path = CHECKPOINT_DIR / f"pipeline_{ts}.json"
    32‚Üí
    33‚Üí        self._data: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    34‚Üí
    35‚Üí    def save(
    36‚Üí        self,
    37‚Üí        keywords: tuple,
    38‚Üí        template: str,
    39‚Üí        variables: dict,
    40‚Üí        company: tuple,
    41‚Üí        location: Optional[str],
    42‚Üí        max_pages: int,
    43‚Üí        batch_pages: int,
    44‚Üí        skip_messaged: bool,
    45‚Üí        interactive: bool,
    46‚Üí        completed_pages: int,
    47‚Üí        sent_ids: List[str],
    48‚Üí        seen_ids: List[str],
    49‚Üí        total_results: Optional[dict] = None,
    50‚Üí        mode: str = "search_center",
    51‚Üí    ) -> None:
    52‚Üí        """Save current pipeline state to checkpoint file."""
    53‚Üí        self._data = {
    54‚Üí            "created_at": self._data.get("created_at", datetime.utcnow().isoformat()),
    55‚Üí            "updated_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
    56‚Üí            "params": {
    57‚Üí                "keywords": list(keywords),
    58‚Üí                "template": template,
    59‚Üí                "variables": variables,
    60‚Üí                "company": list(company) if company else [],
    61‚Üí                "location": location,
    62‚Üí                "max_pages": max_pages,
    63‚Üí                "batch_pages": batch_pages,
    64‚Üí                "skip_messaged": skip_messaged,
    65‚Üí                "interactive": interactive,
    66‚Üí                "mode": mode,
    67‚Üí            },
    68‚Üí            "progress": {
    69‚Üí                "completed_pages": completed_pages,
    70‚Üí                "sent_ids": sent_ids,
    71‚Üí                "seen_ids": seen_ids,
    72‚Üí                "total_results": total_results or {},
    73‚Üí            },
    74‚Üí        }
    75‚Üí
    76‚Üí        try:
    77‚Üí            tmp_fd, tmp_path = tempfile.mkstemp(
    78‚Üí                dir=self.checkpoint_path.parent, suffix=".tmp"
    79‚Üí            )
    80‚Üí            try:
    81‚Üí                with os.fdopen(tmp_fd, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    82‚Üí                    json.dump(self._data, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
    83‚Üí                os.replace(tmp_path, self.checkpoint_path)
    84‚Üí            except BaseException:
    85‚Üí                try:
    86‚Üí                    os.unlink(tmp_path)
    87‚Üí                except OSError:
    88‚Üí                    pass
    89‚Üí                raise
    90‚Üí            logger.debug(f"Checkpoint saved: {self.checkpoint_path}")
    91‚Üí        except Exception as e:
    92‚Üí            logger.error(f"Failed to save checkpoint: {e}")
    93‚Üí
    94‚Üí    @classmethod
    95‚Üí    def load_latest(cls) -> Optional["CheckpointManager"]:
    96‚Üí        """Load the most recent checkpoint file.
    97‚Üí
    98‚Üí        Returns:
    99‚Üí            CheckpointManager with loaded data, or None if no checkpoint exists.
   100‚Üí        """
   101‚Üí        CHECKPOINT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   102‚Üí        files = sorted(CHECKPOINT_DIR.glob("pipeline_*.json"), key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime, reverse=True)
   103‚Üí
   104‚Üí        if not files:
   105‚Üí            return None
   106‚Üí
   107‚Üí        mgr = cls.__new__(cls)
   108‚Üí        mgr.checkpoint_path = files[0]
   109‚Üí
   110‚Üí        try:
   111‚Üí            with open(files[0], "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
   112‚Üí                mgr._data = json.load(f)
   113‚Üí            logger.info(f"Loaded checkpoint: {files[0]}")
   114‚Üí            return mgr
   115‚Üí        except Exception as e:

1‚Üí"""Candidate scoring for priority-based messaging.
     2‚Üí
     3‚ÜíScores candidates based on title seniority, company tier, and keyword
     4‚Üírelevance so that the best-fit candidates get contacted first.
     5‚Üí"""
     6‚Üí
     7‚Üíimport re
     8‚Üífrom typing import Dict, List, Optional
     9‚Üí
    10‚Üífrom loguru import logger
    11‚Üí
    12‚Üí
    13‚Üí# Seniority keywords and their score weights
    14‚ÜíSENIORITY_SCORES: Dict[str, int] = {
    15‚Üí    # C-level
    16‚Üí    "CTO": 50, "CEO": 40, "COO": 35, "VP": 40,
    17‚Üí    "È¶ñÂ∏≠": 45, "ÊÄªË£Å": 40, "ÂâØÊÄªË£Å": 40,
    18‚Üí    # Director
    19‚Üí    "ÊÄªÁõë": 35, "ÊäÄÊúØÊÄªÁõë": 40,
    20‚Üí    # Senior management
    21‚Üí    "ÊäÄÊúØË¥üË¥£‰∫∫": 35, "Ë¥üË¥£‰∫∫": 30, "Tech Lead": 35,
    22‚Üí    # Senior individual contributors
    23‚Üí    "Êû∂ÊûÑÂ∏à": 35, "‰∏ìÂÆ∂": 30, "staff": 30, "Staff": 30,
    24‚Üí    "principal": 35, "Principal": 35,
    25‚Üí    "ËµÑÊ∑±": 25, "È´òÁ∫ß": 20, "Senior": 20, "senior": 20,
    26‚Üí    # Mid-level
    27‚Üí    "ÁªèÁêÜ": 15, "‰∏ªÁÆ°": 15, "lead": 15, "Lead": 15,
    28‚Üí    "‰∏≠Á∫ß": 10,
    29‚Üí    # Junior
    30‚Üí    "ÂàùÁ∫ß": 5, "Junior": 5, "junior": 5,
    31‚Üí    "Âä©ÁêÜ": 3, "ÂÆû‰πÝ": 1,
    32‚Üí}
    33‚Üí
    34‚Üí# Well-known tech companies (tier 1)
    35‚ÜíTIER1_COMPANIES = {
    36‚Üí    "Â≠óËäÇË∑≥Âä®", "ByteDance", "ËÖæËÆØ", "Tencent", "ÈòøÈáåÂ∑¥Â∑¥", "ÈòøÈáå", "Alibaba",
    37‚Üí    "ÁôæÂ∫¶", "Baidu", "ÁæéÂõ¢", "Meituan", "‰∫¨‰∏ú", "JD", "ÊãºÂ§öÂ§ö", "PDD",
    38‚Üí    "Âçé‰∏∫", "Huawei", "Â∞èÁ±≥", "Xiaomi", "ÁΩëÊòì", "NetEase", "Âø´Êâã", "Kwai",
    39‚Üí    "ËöÇËöÅÈõÜÂõ¢", "ËöÇËöÅÈáëÊúç", "Êª¥Êª¥", "DiDi",
    40‚Üí    "Google", "Ë∞∑Ê≠å", "Microsoft", "ÂæÆËΩØ", "Apple", "ËãπÊûú",
    41‚Üí    "Amazon", "‰∫öÈ©¨ÈÄä", "Meta", "Facebook",
    42‚Üí    "Netflix", "Uber", "OpenAI", "Anthropic",
    43‚Üí}
    44‚Üí
    45‚Üí# Good tech companies (tier 2)
    46‚ÜíTIER2_COMPANIES = {
    47‚Üí    "Êê∫Á®ã", "Trip.com", "BÁ´ô", "bilibili", "ÂìîÂì©ÂìîÂì©",
    48‚Üí    "Áü•‰πé", "Zhihu", "Â∞èÁ∫¢‰π¶", "ÂæóÁâ©", "SHEIN",
    49‚Üí    "ÂïÜÊ±§", "Êó∑ËßÜ", "‰æùÂõæ", "ÂØíÊ≠¶Á∫™", "Âú∞Âπ≥Á∫ø",
    50‚Üí    "ÁêÜÊÉ≥Ê±ΩËΩ¶", "ËîöÊù•", "Â∞èÈπè", "Â§ßÁñÜ", "DJI",
    51‚Üí    "Á±≥ÂìàÊ∏∏", "miHoYo", "ËéâËéâ‰∏ù", "ÂèÝÁ∫∏",
    52‚Üí    "360", "Êñ∞Êµ™", "ÂæÆÂçö", "ÊêúÁãê", "Áà±Â•áËâ∫",
    53‚Üí    "OPPO", "vivo", "‰∏ÄÂäÝ", "ËÅîÊÉ≥", "Lenovo",
    54‚Üí    "SAP", "Oracle", "IBM", "Adobe", "Salesforce",
    55‚Üí    "Stripe", "Airbnb", "Spotify", "Twitter", "X",
    56‚Üí}
    57‚Üí
    58‚Üí
    59‚Üídef score_candidate(
    60‚Üí    name: str,
    61‚Üí    title: str,
    62‚Üí    company: str,
    63‚Üí    search_keywords: Optional[List[str]] = None,
    64‚Üí) -> int:
    65‚Üí    """
    66‚Üí    Score a candidate based on title, company, and keyword relevance.
    67‚Üí
    68‚Üí    Higher score = higher priority for messaging.
    69‚Üí
    70‚Üí    Scoring breakdown:
    71‚Üí    - Title seniority: 0-50 points
    72‚Üí    - Company tier: 0-30 points
    73‚Üí    - Keyword match: 0-20 points
    74‚Üí
    75‚Üí    Args:
    76‚Üí        name: Candidate name
    77‚Üí        title: Job title
    78‚Üí        company: Company name
    79‚Üí        search_keywords: Original search keywords for relevance scoring
    80‚Üí
    81‚Üí    Returns:
    82‚Üí        Integer score (higher = better fit)
    83‚Üí    """
    84‚Üí    score = 0
    85‚Üí
    86‚Üí    # 1. Title seniority scoring
    87‚Üí    title_lower = title.lower() if title else ""
    88‚Üí    best_seniority = 0
    89‚Üí    for keyword, points in SENIORITY_SCORES.items():
    90‚Üí        if keyword.lower() in title_lower or keyword in title:
    91‚Üí            best_seniority = max(best_seniority, points)
    92‚Üí    score += best_seniority
    93‚Üí
    94‚Üí    # 2. Company tier scoring
    95‚Üí    if company:
    96‚Üí        company_matched = False
    97‚Üí        for t1 in TIER1_COMPANIES:
    98‚Üí            if t1.lower() in company.lower() or company.lower() in t1.lower():
    99‚Üí                score += 30
   100‚Üí                company_matched = True
   101‚Üí                break
   102‚Üí        if not company_matched:
   103‚Üí            for t2 in TIER2_COMPANIES:
   104‚Üí                if t2.lower() in company.lower() or company.lower() in t2.lower():
   105‚Üí                    score += 20
   106‚Üí                    break
   107‚Üí
   108‚Üí    # 3. Keyword relevance (if search keywords provided)
   109‚Üí    if search_keywords and title:
   110‚Üí        for kw in search_keywords:
   111‚Üí            kw_lower = kw.lower()
   112‚Üí            if kw_lower in title_lower:
   113‚Üí                score += 10
   114‚Üí            elif kw_lower in (company or "").lower():
   115‚Üí                score += 5
   116‚Üí
   117‚Üí    # 4. Bonus: R&D-specific titles
   118‚Üí    rd_bonus_patterns = [
   119‚Üí        r"Â∑•Á®ãÂ∏à", r"ÂºÄÂèë", r"Êû∂ÊûÑ", r"ÁÆóÊ≥ï", r"ÁÝîÂèë",
   120‚Üí        r"engineer", r"developer", r"architect",
   121‚Üí    ]
   122‚Üí    for pattern in rd_bonus_patterns:
   123‚Üí        if re.search(pattern, title, re.IGNORECASE):
   124‚Üí            score += 5
   125‚Üí            break
   126‚Üí
   127‚Üí    return score
   128‚Üí
   129‚Üí
   130‚Üídef sort_candidates_by_score(
   131‚Üí    candidates: list,
   132‚Üí    search_keywords: Optional[List[str]] = None,
   133‚Üí) -> list:
   134‚Üí    """
   135‚Üí    Sort a list of candidate dicts or objects by score (descending).
   136‚Üí
   137‚Üí    Works with both CandidateBasic dataclass instances and dicts.
   138‚Üí
   139‚Üí    Args:
   140‚Üí        candidates: List of candidates (dicts or objects with name/title/company)
   141‚Üí        search_keywords: Original search keywords for relevance scoring
   142‚Üí
   143‚Üí    Returns:
   144‚Üí        Sorted list (highest score first), each item gets a '_score' attribute/key
   145‚Üí    """
   146‚Üí    scored = []
   147‚Üí    for c in candidates:
   148‚Üí        if isinstance(c, dict):
   149‚Üí            name = c.get("name", "")
   150‚Üí            title = c.get("title", "")
   151‚Üí            company = c.get("company", "")
   152‚Üí        else:
   153‚Üí            name = getattr(c, "name", "")
   154‚Üí            title = getattr(c, "title", "")
   155‚Üí            company = getattr(c, "company", "")
   156‚Üí
   157‚Üí        s = score_candidate(name, title, company, search_keywords)
   158‚Üí
   159‚Üí        if isinstance(c, dict):
   160‚Üí            c["_score"] = s
   161‚Üí        else:
   162‚Üí            c._score = s
   163‚Üí
   164‚Üí        scored.append((s, c))
   165‚Üí
   166‚Üí    scored.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
   167‚Üí
   168‚Üí    result = [item[1] for item in scored]
   169‚Üí
   170‚Üí    if result:
   171‚Üí        top = scored[0][0]
   172‚Üí        bottom = scored[-1][0]
   173‚Üí        logger.info(f"Candidates scored: top={top}, bottom={bottom}, count={len(result)}")
   174‚Üí
   175‚Üí    return result
   176‚Üí

1‚Üí"""Input validation utilities."""
     2‚Üí
     3‚Üíimport re
     4‚Üífrom typing import Optional, Dict, Any
     5‚Üí
     6‚Üífrom src.exceptions.errors import ValidationError
     7‚Üí
     8‚Üí
     9‚Üídef validate_maimai_id(maimai_id: str) -> str:
    10‚Üí    """
    11‚Üí    Validate Maimai user ID format.
    12‚Üí
    13‚Üí    Args:
    14‚Üí        maimai_id: Maimai user ID to validate
    15‚Üí
    16‚Üí    Returns:
    17‚Üí        Validated and cleaned ID
    18‚Üí
    19‚Üí    Raises:
    20‚Üí        ValidationError: If ID format is invalid
    21‚Üí    """
    22‚Üí    if not maimai_id:
    23‚Üí        raise ValidationError("Maimai ID cannot be empty")
    24‚Üí
    25‚Üí    # Remove whitespace
    26‚Üí    maimai_id = str(maimai_id).strip()
    27‚Üí
    28‚Üí    # Check if it's alphanumeric
    29‚Üí    if not re.match(r'^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$', maimai_id):
    30‚Üí        raise ValidationError(f"Invalid Maimai ID format: {maimai_id}")
    31‚Üí
    32‚Üí    return maimai_id
    33‚Üí
    34‚Üí
    35‚Üídef validate_keywords(keywords: str) -> str:
    36‚Üí    """
    37‚Üí    Validate search keywords.
    38‚Üí
    39‚Üí    Args:
    40‚Üí        keywords: Search keywords
    41‚Üí
    42‚Üí    Returns:
    43‚Üí        Validated keywords
    44‚Üí
    45‚Üí    Raises:
    46‚Üí        ValidationError: If keywords are invalid
    47‚Üí    """
    48‚Üí    if not keywords or not keywords.strip():
    49‚Üí        raise ValidationError("Search keywords cannot be empty")
    50‚Üí
    51‚Üí    keywords = keywords.strip()
    52‚Üí
    53‚Üí    # Check length
    54‚Üí    if len(keywords) < 2:
    55‚Üí        raise ValidationError("Search keywords must be at least 2 characters")
    56‚Üí
    57‚Üí    if len(keywords) > 200:
    58‚Üí        raise ValidationError("Search keywords cannot exceed 200 characters")
    59‚Üí
    60‚Üí    return keywords
    61‚Üí
    62‚Üí
    63‚Üídef validate_template_variables(template: Dict[str, Any], variables: Dict[str, str]) -> None:
    64‚Üí    """
    65‚Üí    Validate that all required template variables are provided.
    66‚Üí
    67‚Üí    Args:
    68‚Üí        template: Template dictionary with 'variables' key
    69‚Üí        variables: Provided variables dictionary
    70‚Üí
    71‚Üí    Raises:
    72‚Üí        ValidationError: If required variables are missing
    73‚Üí    """
    74‚Üí    required_vars = template.get('variables', [])
    75‚Üí    provided_vars = set(variables.keys())
    76‚Üí    required_set = set(required_vars)
    77‚Üí
    78‚Üí    missing_vars = required_set - provided_vars
    79‚Üí
    80‚Üí    if missing_vars:
    81‚Üí        raise ValidationError(
    82‚Üí            f"Missing required template variables: {', '.join(missing_vars)}"
    83‚Üí        )
    84‚Üí
    85‚Üí
    86‚Üídef validate_file_path(
    87‚Üí    file_path: str,
    88‚Üí    extension: Optional[str] = None,
    89‚Üí    allowed_dir: Optional[str] = None,
    90‚Üí) -> str:
    91‚Üí    """
    92‚Üí    Validate file path format and prevent path traversal.
    93‚Üí
    94‚Üí    Resolves the path to an absolute form and ensures it falls within
    95‚Üí    an allowed directory (defaults to current working directory).
    96‚Üí
    97‚Üí    Args:
    98‚Üí        file_path: File path to validate
    99‚Üí        extension: Expected file extension (e.g., '.xlsx', '.csv')
   100‚Üí        allowed_dir: Directory the resolved path must reside in.
   101‚Üí                     Defaults to current working directory.
   102‚Üí
   103‚Üí    Returns:
   104‚Üí        Validated, resolved file path
   105‚Üí
   106‚Üí    Raises:
   107‚Üí        ValidationError: If path is invalid or escapes allowed directory
   108‚Üí    """
   109‚Üí    from pathlib import Path
   110‚Üí
   111‚Üí    if not file_path or not file_path.strip():
   112‚Üí        raise ValidationError("File path cannot be empty")
   113‚Üí
   114‚Üí    file_path = file_path.strip()
   115‚Üí
   116‚Üí    # Check for shell metacharacters that could cause injection
   117‚Üí    dangerous_chars = ['$', '`', '|', ';', '&']
   118‚Üí    if any(char in file_path for char in dangerous_chars):
   119‚Üí        raise ValidationError(f"File path contains dangerous characters: {file_path}")
   120‚Üí
   121‚Üí    # Resolve to absolute path and check traversal
   122‚Üí    resolved = Path(file_path).resolve()
   123‚Üí    if allowed_dir is None:
   124‚Üí        allowed = Path.cwd().resolve()
   125‚Üí    else:
   126‚Üí        allowed = Path(allowed_dir).resolve()
   127‚Üí
   128‚Üí    if not str(resolved).startswith(str(allowed) + '/') and resolved != allowed:
   129‚Üí        raise ValidationError(
   130‚Üí            f"File path must be within {allowed}: {file_path}"
   131‚Üí        )
   132‚Üí
   133‚Üí    # Check extension if specified
   134‚Üí    if extension:
   135‚Üí        if not extension.startswith('.'):
   136‚Üí            extension = f'.{extension}'
   137‚Üí
   138‚Üí        if not resolved.name.lower().endswith(extension):
   139‚Üí            raise ValidationError(
   140‚Üí                f"File path must have {extension} extension: {file_path}"
   141‚Üí            )
   142‚Üí
   143‚Üí    return str(resolved)
   144‚Üí
   145‚Üí
   146‚Üí

1‚Üí"""Logging configuration using Loguru."""
     2‚Üí
     3‚Üíimport sys
     4‚Üífrom pathlib import Path
     5‚Üí
     6‚Üífrom loguru import logger
     7‚Üí
     8‚Üífrom src.utils.config import get_config
     9‚Üí
    10‚Üí
    11‚Üídef setup_logger():
    12‚Üí    """Configure Loguru logger with settings from config."""
    13‚Üí    config = get_config()
    14‚Üí
    15‚Üí    # Remove default handler
    16‚Üí    logger.remove()
    17‚Üí
    18‚Üí    # Get logging settings
    19‚Üí    log_level = config.get('logging.level', 'INFO')
    20‚Üí    log_format = config.get('logging.format')
    21‚Üí    rotation = config.get('logging.rotation', '10 MB')
    22‚Üí    retention = config.get('logging.retention', '30 days')
    23‚Üí    log_dir = Path(config.get('data.log_dir', 'data/logs'))
    24‚Üí
    25‚Üí    # Create log directory if it doesn't exist
    26‚Üí    log_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    27‚Üí
    28‚Üí    # Add console handler with colors
    29‚Üí    logger.add(
    30‚Üí        sys.stdout,
    31‚Üí        format=log_format,
    32‚Üí        level=log_level,
    33‚Üí        colorize=True,

    35‚Üí

1‚Üí"""Shared captcha detection utility.
     2‚Üí
     3‚ÜíDetects captcha elements on page and pauses for manual resolution.
     4‚ÜíUsed by auth and search modules.
     5‚Üí"""
     6‚Üí
     7‚Üíimport sys
     8‚Üí
     9‚Üífrom patchright.async_api import Page
    10‚Üífrom loguru import logger
    11‚Üífrom rich.console import Console
    12‚Üí
    13‚Üíconsole = Console()
    14‚Üí
    15‚ÜíCAPTCHA_SELECTORS = [
    16‚Üí    '[class*="captcha"]',
    17‚Üí    '[class*="verify"]',
    18‚Üí    '[id*="captcha"]',
    19‚Üí    '[class*="slider"]',
    20‚Üí    '[class*="geetest"]',
    21‚Üí    'iframe[src*="captcha"]',
    22‚Üí]
    23‚Üí
    24‚Üí
    25‚Üíasync def check_captcha(page: Page, report_to_rate_limiter: bool = False) -> None:
    26‚Üí    """Detect captcha elements on page and pause for manual resolution.
    27‚Üí
    28‚Üí    Args:
    29‚Üí        page: Playwright page instance
    30‚Üí        report_to_rate_limiter: If True, report captcha to adaptive rate limiter
    31‚Üí    """
    32‚Üí    for selector in CAPTCHA_SELECTORS:
    33‚Üí        try:
    34‚Üí            elem = await page.query_selector(selector)
    35‚Üí            if elem and await elem.is_visible():
    36‚Üí                if report_to_rate_limiter:
    37‚Üí                    from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter
    38‚Üí                    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
    39‚Üí                    rate_limiter.report_captcha()
    40‚Üí
    41‚Üí                console.print("[bold red]Captcha detected! Please solve it in the browser window.[/bold red]")
    42‚Üí                console.print("[dim]Press Enter here after solving the captcha...[/dim]")
    43‚Üí                sys.stdin.readline()
    44‚Üí                await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
    45‚Üí                return
    46‚Üí        except Exception:
    47‚Üí            continue
    48‚Üí

1‚Üí"""Search module for finding candidates on Maimai.

     3‚ÜíHandles candidate search with filters, pagination,
     4‚Üíand extraction of basic candidate information.
     5‚Üí"""
     6‚Üí
     7‚Üífrom dataclasses import dataclass, asdict

    10‚Üí
    11‚Üífrom patchright.async_api import Page

    26‚Üífrom src.exceptions.errors import (

    30‚Üí
    31‚Üíconsole = Console()
    32‚Üí
    33‚Üí
    34‚Üí# Maimai search URL
    35‚ÜíMAIMAI_SEARCH_URL = "https://maimai.cn/web/search_center"
    36‚Üí
    37‚Üí# Names indicating paid/premium-only profiles that should be skipped
    38‚ÜíPREMIUM_PLACEHOLDER_NAMES = {"ËÑâËÑâÈ´ò‰ª∑ÂÄº‰∫∫ËÑâ"}
    39‚Üí
    40‚Üí# Keywords indicating non-R&D roles (to be filtered out)
    41‚ÜíNON_RD_KEYWORDS = {
    42‚Üí    "ÈîÄÂîÆ", "ËøêËê•", "‰∫ßÂìÅ", "Â∏ÇÂú∫", "ÁîµÂ≠êÂïÜÂä°", "ÁîµÂïÜ",
    43‚Üí    "ÂïÜÂä°", "ÂìÅÁâå", "ÂÖ¨ÂÖ≥", "ÂÆ¢Êúç", "ÈááË¥≠", "ÊãõÂïÜ",
    44‚Üí    "‰∫∫Âäõ", "‰∫∫‰∫ã", "HR", "hr", "HRBP", "Ë°åÊîø",
    45‚Üí    "Ë¥¢Âä°", "‰ºöËÆ°", "ÂÆ°ËÆ°", "Ê≥ïÂä°", "Ê≥ïÂæã", "ÂêàËßÑ",
    46‚Üí    "ÂÜÖÂÆπ", "ÁºñËæë", "ÁøªËØë", "ÊïôËÇ≤", "ÂüπËÆ≠", "ÊïôÂ≠¶",
    47‚Üí    "Áâ©ÊµÅ", "‰æõÂ∫îÈìæ", "‰ªìÂÇ®",
    48‚Üí}
    49‚Üí
    50‚Üí
    51‚Üí
    52‚Üídef _is_non_rd_title(title: str) -> bool:
    53‚Üí    """Check if a title indicates a non-R&D role.
    54‚Üí
    55‚Üí    Strict mode: if any non-R&D keyword appears, filter out regardless of
    56‚Üí    whether R&D keywords are also present (e.g. "ÊäÄÊúØ‰∫ßÂìÅÁªèÁêÜ" is filtered).
    57‚Üí    Returns False (keep) only if title is empty or contains no non-R&D keywords.
    58‚Üí    """
    59‚Üí    if not title:
    60‚Üí        return False
    61‚Üí
    62‚Üí    # Strict: any non-R&D keyword present ‚Üí filter out
    63‚Üí    if any(kw in title for kw in NON_RD_KEYWORDS):
    64‚Üí        return True
    65‚Üí
    66‚Üí    return False
    67‚Üí
    68‚Üí
    69‚Üí@dataclass
    70‚Üíclass CandidateBasic:
    71‚Üí    """Basic candidate information from search results."""
    72‚Üí    maimai_id: str
    73‚Üí    name: str
    74‚Üí    title: str
    75‚Üí    company: str

    78‚Üí
    79‚Üí    def to_dict(self) -> dict:
    80‚Üí        return asdict(self)
    81‚Üí
    82‚Üí
    83‚Üíasync def search_candidates(
    84‚Üí    keywords: str,
    85‚Üí    company: Optional[tuple] = None,
    86‚Üí    location: Optional[str] = None,
    87‚Üí    pages: int = 1,
    88‚Üí    start_page: int = 1,
    89‚Üí    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None
    90‚Üí) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
    91‚Üí    """
    92‚Üí    Search for candidates on Maimai.
    93‚Üí
    94‚Üí    Args:
    95‚Üí        keywords: Search keywords (e.g., "È´òÁ∫ßÂâçÁ´ØÂ∑•Á®ãÂ∏à")
    96‚Üí        company: Filter by company names, tuple of strings (optional)
    97‚Üí        location: Filter by location (optional)
    98‚Üí        pages: Number of pages to scrape (default 1)
    99‚Üí        start_page: First page number to scrape (default 1)
   100‚Üí        browser: Browser manager instance
   101‚Üí
   102‚Üí    Returns:
   103‚Üí        List of CandidateBasic objects
   104‚Üí
   105‚Üí    Raises:
   106‚Üí        RateLimitExceededError: If rate limit exceeded
   107‚Üí        SelectorNotFoundError: If page elements not found
   108‚Üí    """
   109‚Üí    # Validate inputs
   110‚Üí    validate_keywords(keywords)
   111‚Üí
   112‚Üí    if browser is None:
   113‚Üí        browser = get_browser_manager()
   114‚Üí
   115‚Üí    config = get_config()
   116‚Üí    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   117‚Üí    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   118‚Üí
   119‚Üí    # Ensure logged in
   120‚Üí    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   121‚Üí
   122‚Üí    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   123‚Üí
   124‚Üí    with Progress(
   125‚Üí        SpinnerColumn(),
   126‚Üí        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
   127‚Üí        console=console
   128‚Üí    ) as progress:
   129‚Üí
   130‚Üí        end_page = start_page + pages
   131‚Üí        for page_num in range(start_page, end_page):
   132‚Üí            task = progress.add_task(f"Searching page {page_num}/{end_page - 1}...", total=None)
   133‚Üí
   134‚Üí            try:
   135‚Üí                # Check rate limit (waits through min-interval)
   136‚Üí                await async_check_rate_limit('search')
   137‚Üí
   138‚Üí                # Build search URL
   139‚Üí                params = {
   140‚Üí                    'type': 'contact',
   141‚Üí                    'query': keywords,
   142‚Üí                    'highlight': 'true'
   143‚Üí                }
   144‚Üí                if page_num > 1:
   145‚Üí                    params['page'] = str(page_num)
   146‚Üí
   147‚Üí                search_url = f"{MAIMAI_SEARCH_URL}?{urlencode(params)}"
   148‚Üí
   149‚Üí                # Navigate to search page
   150‚Üí                page = browser.page
   151‚Üí                await retry_navigation(page, search_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   152‚Üí
   153‚Üí                # Wait for page load
   154‚Üí                await async_random_delay('page_load')
   155‚Üí
   156‚Üí                # Check for captcha
   157‚Üí                await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   158‚Üí
   159‚Üí                # Click "‰∫∫ËÑâ" tab to show contact results
   160‚Üí                try:
   161‚Üí                    renmai_tab = await page.query_selector('text="‰∫∫ËÑâ"')
   162‚Üí                    if renmai_tab:
   163‚Üí                        await renmai_tab.click()
   164‚Üí                        logger.info("Clicked '‰∫∫ËÑâ' tab")
   165‚Üí                        await async_random_delay('action')
   166‚Üí                        # Wait for content to load
   167‚Üí                        await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   168‚Üí                except Exception as e:
   169‚Üí                    logger.debug(f"Could not click ‰∫∫ËÑâ tab: {e}")
   170‚Üí
   171‚Üí                # Simulate human behavior
   172‚Üí                await human_scroll(page, 'down', distance=300)
   173‚Üí                await async_random_delay('action')
   174‚Üí
   175‚Üí                # Extract candidates from this page
   176‚Üí                candidates = await _extract_search_results(page, config)
   177‚Üí
   178‚Üí                if not candidates:
   179‚Üí                    logger.info(f"No results found on page {page_num}")
   180‚Üí                    # Save screenshot for debugging
   181‚Üí                    await browser.screenshot(f"search_debug_page{page_num}")
   182‚Üí                    progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: No results")
   183‚Üí                    break
   184‚Üí
   185‚Üí                # Filter out non-R&D roles
   186‚Üí                before_rd_filter = len(candidates)
   187‚Üí                candidates = [c for c in candidates if not _is_non_rd_title(c.title)]
   188‚Üí                rd_filtered = before_rd_filter - len(candidates)
   189‚Üí                if rd_filtered > 0:
   190‚Üí                    logger.info(f"Filtered out {rd_filtered} non-R&D candidates")
   191‚Üí
   192‚Üí                # Apply filters if specified
   193‚Üí                if company:
   194‚Üí                    company_lower = [cn.lower() for cn in company]
   195‚Üí                    candidates = [c for c in candidates if any(cn in c.company.lower() for cn in company_lower)]
   196‚Üí
   197‚Üí                if location:
   198‚Üí                    candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.location and location.lower() in c.location.lower()]
   199‚Üí
   200‚Üí                all_candidates.extend(candidates)
   201‚Üí                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Found {len(candidates)} candidates")
   202‚Üí
   203‚Üí                # Log the action
   204‚Üí                rate_limiter.log_action('search', {
   205‚Üí                    'keywords': keywords,
   206‚Üí                    'page': page_num,
   207‚Üí                    'results': len(candidates)
   208‚Üí                })
   209‚Üí
   210‚Üí                # Save candidates to database
   211‚Üí                _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates, keywords)
   212‚Üí
   213‚Üí                # Delay before next page
   214‚Üí                if page_num < end_page - 1:
   215‚Üí                    await async_random_delay('page_load')
   216‚Üí
   217‚Üí            except Exception as e:
   218‚Üí                logger.error(f"Error on page {page_num}: {e}")
   219‚Üí                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Error - {str(e)[:30]}")
   220‚Üí                # Take screenshot for debugging
   221‚Üí                await browser.screenshot(f"search_error_page{page_num}")
   222‚Üí                continue
   223‚Üí
   224‚Üí    # Log search to history
   225‚Üí    _log_search_history(db_manager, keywords, company, location, pages, len(all_candidates))
   226‚Üí
   227‚Üí    console.print(f"[green]Search complete. Found {len(all_candidates)} candidates.[/green]")
   228‚Üí    return all_candidates
   229‚Üí
   230‚Üí
   231‚Üíasync def _extract_search_results(page: Page, config) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   232‚Üí    """
   233‚Üí    Extract candidate information from search results page.
   234‚Üí
   235‚Üí    Args:
   236‚Üí        page: Playwright page instance
   237‚Üí        config: Config instance
   238‚Üí
   239‚Üí    Returns:
   240‚Üí        List of CandidateBasic objects
   241‚Üí    """
   242‚Üí    candidates = []
   243‚Üí
   244‚Üí    try:
   245‚Üí        # Wait for page to be fully loaded
   246‚Üí        await page.wait_for_load_state('networkidle', timeout=10000)
   247‚Üí    except Exception:
   248‚Üí        pass  # Continue even if networkidle times out
   249‚Üí
   250‚Üí    try:
   251‚Üí        # Strategy: Extract candidates by finding avatar images and their associated text
   252‚Üí        candidates_data = await page.evaluate('''() => {
   253‚Üí            const candidates = [];
   254‚Üí            const seenNames = new Set();
   255‚Üí
   256‚Üí            // Find all images that look like avatars
   257‚Üí            const images = document.querySelectorAll('img');
   258‚Üí
   259‚Üí            for (const img of images) {
   260‚Üí                // Skip large images (probably not avatars)
   261‚Üí                const rect = img.getBoundingClientRect();
   262‚Üí                if (rect.width > 100 || rect.height > 100) continue;
   263‚Üí                if (rect.width < 20 || rect.height < 20) continue;
   264‚Üí
   265‚Üí                // Find parent container (the card)
   266‚Üí                let card = img.parentElement;
   267‚Üí                for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
   268‚Üí                    const cardRect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
   269‚Üí                    // Look for a reasonable card size
   270‚Üí                    if (cardRect.width > 200 && cardRect.height > 50 && cardRect.height < 200) {
   271‚Üí                        break;
   272‚Üí                    }
   273‚Üí                    card = card.parentElement;
   274‚Üí                }
   275‚Üí
   276‚Üí                if (!card) continue;
   277‚Üí
   278‚Üí                // Get all text nodes from card, preserving order
   279‚Üí                const textParts = [];
   280‚Üí                const walker = document.createTreeWalker(card, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT, null, false);
   281‚Üí                while (walker.nextNode()) {
   282‚Üí                    const text = walker.currentNode.textContent.trim();
   283‚Üí                    if (text && text.length > 0 && text.length < 100) {
   284‚Üí                        textParts.push(text);
   285‚Üí                    }
   286‚Üí                }
   287‚Üí
   288‚Üí                // Parse candidate info from text parts
   289‚Üí                // Pattern: Name, Activity time, Company+Position, Industry|Department
   290‚Üí                let name = '';
   291‚Üí                let company = '';
   292‚Üí                let title = '';
   293‚Üí                let industry = '';
   294‚Üí
   295‚Üí                // Compound job title patterns (longer patterns first for greedy match)
   296‚Üí                const jobPatterns = [
   297‚Üí                    // Compound titles with prefix modifiers
   298‚Üí                    /(?:È´òÁ∫ß|ËµÑÊ∑±|È¶ñÂ∏≠|ÂàùÁ∫ß|‰∏≠Á∫ß|senior|junior|staff|principal|lead)?\s*(?:ÂâçÁ´Ø|ÂêéÁ´Ø|ÂÖ®ÊÝà|web|Web|iOS|Android|Java|Python|Go|C\+\+|PHP|.NET|ÁÆóÊ≥ï|Êï∞ÊçÆ|AI|Êú∫Âô®Â≠¶‰πÝ|Ê∑±Â∫¶Â≠¶‰πÝ|NLP|Â§ßÊï∞ÊçÆ|‰∫ëËÆ°ÁÆó|DevOps|SRE|ÂÆâÂÖ®|ÊµãËØï|ÂµåÂÖ•Âºè|ÁßªÂä®Á´Ø|ÂÆ¢Êà∑Á´Ø|ÊúçÂä°Á´Ø|Âå∫ÂùóÈìæ|ÂÖ∑Ë∫´Êô∫ËÉΩ|Ëá™Âä®È©æÈ©∂|Êú∫Âô®‰∫∫)?\s*(?:Â∑•Á®ãÂ∏à|ÂºÄÂèë|Êû∂ÊûÑÂ∏à|‰∏ìÂÆ∂|ÊäÄÊúØÁªèÁêÜ|ÊäÄÊúØÊÄªÁõë|ÊäÄÊúØË¥üË¥£‰∫∫|Tech\s*Lead)/i,
   299‚Üí                    // Management titles
   300‚Üí                    /(?:ÊäÄÊúØ|‰∫ßÂìÅ|ËøêËê•|Â∏ÇÂú∫|ÈîÄÂîÆ|‰∫∫Âäõ|Ë¥¢Âä°|Ë°åÊîø|È°πÁõÆ|ÁÝîÂèë)?\s*(?:ÊÄªÁõë|ÁªèÁêÜ|‰∏ªÁÆ°|Ë¥üË¥£‰∫∫|VP|ÊÄªË£Å|ÂâØÊÄª|Âêà‰ºô‰∫∫|ÂàõÂßã‰∫∫|Ëë£‰∫ã|CEO|CTO|COO|CFO|CMO|CHO|CIO)/i,
   301‚Üí                    // Other roles
   302‚Üí                    /(?:‰∫ßÂìÅ|UI|UX|‰∫§‰∫í|ËßÜËßâ)?\s*(?:ËÆæËÆ°Â∏à|ÂàÜÊûêÂ∏à|È°æÈóÆ|ËøêËê•|Âä©ÁêÜ|ÂÆû‰πÝÁîü?)/i,
   303‚Üí                ];
   304‚Üí
   305‚Üí                // Patterns for text that should be skipped
   306‚Üí                const skipPatterns = [
   307‚Üí                    /^[+Ôºã]\s*Â•ΩÂèã$/,          // "+ Â•ΩÂèã" button
   308‚Üí                    /^\d+‰∏™ÂÖ±ÂêåÂ•ΩÂèã$/,           // "1‰∏™ÂÖ±ÂêåÂ•ΩÂèã" social label
   309‚Üí                    /^ÂÖ±ÂêåÂ•ΩÂèã/,                 // "ÂÖ±ÂêåÂ•ΩÂèã..." variants
   310‚Üí                    /^Â∑≤ÂÖ≥Ê≥®$/,                  // "Â∑≤ÂÖ≥Ê≥®" button
   311‚Üí                    /^Ê∑ªÂäÝÂ•ΩÂèã$/,                // "Ê∑ªÂäÝÂ•ΩÂèã" button
   312‚Üí                    /^ÂÖ≥Ê≥®$/,                    // "ÂÖ≥Ê≥®" button
   313‚Üí                    /^Â•ΩÂèã$/,                    // "Â•ΩÂèã" label
   314‚Üí                    /^[|ÔΩú¬∑]$/,                  // separators
   315‚Üí                ];
   316‚Üí
   317‚Üí                const isSkippable = (text) => {
   318‚Üí                    if (skipPatterns.some(p => p.test(text))) return true;
   319‚Üí                    // Activity time
   320‚Üí                    if (/Â§©Ââç|Â∞èÊó∂Ââç|ÂàÜÈíüÂâç|ÂàöÂàö|Ê¥ªË∑É|Âú®Á∫ø/.test(text)) return true;
   321‚Üí                    return false;
   322‚Üí                };
   323‚Üí
   324‚Üí                for (let i = 0; i < textParts.length; i++) {
   325‚Üí                    const part = textParts[i];
   326‚Üí
   327‚Üí                    if (isSkippable(part)) continue;
   328‚Üí
   329‚Üí                    // First short text (2-15 chars, pure CJK/letters) is likely the name
   330‚Üí                    if (!name && part.length >= 2 && part.length <= 15) {
   331‚Üí                        if (/^[\u4e00-\u9fa5a-zA-Z¬∑\s]+$/.test(part)) {
   332‚Üí                            name = part;
   333‚Üí                            continue;
   334‚Üí                        }
   335‚Üí                    }
   336‚Üí
   337‚Üí                    // After name, next substantial text is company+position
   338‚Üí                    if (name && !company && part.length > 2) {
   339‚Üí                        // Try to split company and position using regex patterns
   340‚Üí                        let splitDone = false;
   341‚Üí                        for (const pattern of jobPatterns) {
   342‚Üí                            const match = part.match(pattern);
   343‚Üí                            if (match && match.index > 0) {
   344‚Üí                                company = part.substring(0, match.index).trim();
   345‚Üí                                title = match[0].trim();
   346‚Üí                                splitDone = true;
   347‚Üí                                break;
   348‚Üí                            }
   349‚Üí                        }
   350‚Üí                        if (!splitDone) {
   351‚Üí                            company = part;
   352‚Üí                        }
   353‚Üí                        continue;
   354‚Üí                    }
   355‚Üí
   356‚Üí                    // Next part is industry|department info
   357‚Üí                    if (name && company && !industry && part.length > 2) {
   358‚Üí                        industry = part;
   359‚Üí                        // If title wasn't split from company, use industry as fallback context
   360‚Üí                        if (!title) {
   361‚Üí                            title = industry;
   362‚Üí                        }
   363‚Üí                        break;
   364‚Üí                    }
   365‚Üí                }
   366‚Üí
   367‚Üí                // Skip if no name found or premium placeholder
   368‚Üí                if (!name) continue;
   369‚Üí                if (name === 'ËÑâËÑâÈ´ò‰ª∑ÂÄº‰∫∫ËÑâ') continue;
   370‚Üí
   371‚Üí                // Generate a unique ID based on name + company + title
   372‚Üí                const idSource = (name || '') + '|' + (company || '') + '|' + (title || '');
   373‚Üí                let hash = 0;
   374‚Üí                for (let j = 0; j < idSource.length; j++) {
   375‚Üí                    const ch = idSource.charCodeAt(j);
   376‚Üí                    hash = ((hash << 5) - hash) + ch;
   377‚Üí                    hash = hash & hash; // Convert to 32bit integer
   378‚Üí                }
   379‚Üí                const maimaiId = 'mm_' + Math.abs(hash).toString(16).padStart(8, '0');
   380‚Üí
   381‚Üí                // Skip duplicates based on the computed ID
   382‚Üí                if (seenNames.has(maimaiId)) continue;
   383‚Üí                seenNames.add(maimaiId);
   384‚Üí
   385‚Üí                // Extract profile URL from any <a> inside the card
   386‚Üí                let profileUrl = '';
   387‚Üí                let fallbackUrl = '';
   388‚Üí
   389‚Üí                // First: check <a> ancestors between img and card (avatar is often wrapped in a profile link)
   390‚Üí                let ancestor = img.parentElement;
   391‚Üí                while (ancestor && ancestor !== card) {
   392‚Üí                    if (ancestor.tagName === 'A' && ancestor.href) {
   393‚Üí                        const href = ancestor.getAttribute('href') || '';
   394‚Üí                        if (href.includes('/profile/detail') || href.includes('/contact/detail/') || href.includes('/u/') || href.includes('egid=') || href.includes('dstu=')) {
   395‚Üí                            profileUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
   396‚Üí                            break;
   397‚Üí                        }
   398‚Üí                    }
   399‚Üí                    ancestor = ancestor.parentElement;
   400‚Üí                }
   401‚Üí
   402‚Üí                // Second: search all <a> descendants inside the card
   403‚Üí                if (!profileUrl) {
   404‚Üí                    const links = card.querySelectorAll('a[href]');
   405‚Üí                    for (const link of links) {
   406‚Üí                        const href = link.getAttribute('href') || '';
   407‚Üí                        if (href.includes('/profile/detail') || href.includes('/contact/detail/') || href.includes('/u/') || href.includes('egid=') || href.includes('dstu=')) {
   408‚Üí                            profileUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
   409‚Üí                            break;
   410‚Üí                        }
   411‚Üí                        // Capture any maimai internal link as fallback
   412‚Üí                        if (!fallbackUrl && href && !href.startsWith('javascript:') && (href.startsWith('/') || href.includes('maimai.cn'))) {
   413‚Üí                            fallbackUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
   414‚Üí                        }
   415‚Üí                    }
   416‚Üí                }
   417‚Üí                if (!profileUrl && fallbackUrl) {
   418‚Üí                    profileUrl = fallbackUrl;
   419‚Üí                }
   420‚Üí
   421‚Üí                // Extract location: look for remaining short text parts after name/company/title
   422‚Üí                // Common patterns: city names like "Âåó‰∫¨", "‰∏äÊµ∑", "Ê∑±Âú≥" etc.
   423‚Üí                let location = '';
   424‚Üí                const locationPatterns = /^(Âåó‰∫¨|‰∏äÊµ∑|ÂπøÂ∑û|Ê∑±Âú≥|Êù≠Â∑û|ÊàêÈÉΩ|Âçó‰∫¨|Ê≠¶Ê±â|Ë•øÂÆâ|ËãèÂ∑û|ÈïøÊ≤ô|Â§©Ê¥•|ÈáçÂ∫Ü|ÈÉëÂ∑û|‰∏úËéû|ÈùíÂ≤õ|Â§ßËøû|ÂÆÅÊ≥¢|Âé¶Èó®|ÂêàËÇ•|‰ΩõÂ±±|Á¶èÂ∑û|ÊòÜÊòé|ÊµéÂçó|ÁèÝÊµ∑|ÊóÝÈî°|Â∏∏Â∑û|Êµ∑Â§ñ|ËøúÁ®ã|È¶ôÊ∏Ø|Âè∞Âåó|Êñ∞ÂäÝÂù°|ÁæéÂõΩ|Êó•Êú¨|Èü©ÂõΩ|Ëã±ÂõΩ|ÂÖ®ÂõΩ|ÂÖ∂‰ªñ)/;
   425‚Üí                for (let i = 0; i < textParts.length; i++) {
   426‚Üí                    const part = textParts[i];
   427‚Üí                    if (part === name || part === company || part === title || part === industry) continue;
   428‚Üí                    if (isSkippable(part)) continue;
   429‚Üí                    if (locationPatterns.test(part) && part.length <= 10) {
   430‚Üí                        location = part;
   431‚Üí                        break;
   432‚Üí                    }
   433‚Üí                }
   434‚Üí
   435‚Üí                candidates.push({
   436‚Üí                    name: name,
   437‚Üí                    title: title || '',
   438‚Üí                    company: company || '',
   439‚Üí                    maimai_id: maimaiId,
   440‚Üí                    profile_url: profileUrl,
   441‚Üí                    location: location,
   442‚Üí                });
   443‚Üí            }
   444‚Üí
   445‚Üí            return candidates;
   446‚Üí        }''')
   447‚Üí
   448‚Üí        logger.info(f"JavaScript extraction found {len(candidates_data)} candidates")
   449‚Üí
   450‚Üí        for data in candidates_data:
   451‚Üí            if data.get('name'):
   452‚Üí                candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
   453‚Üí                    maimai_id=data.get('maimai_id', ''),
   454‚Üí                    name=data.get('name', ''),
   455‚Üí                    title=data.get('title', ''),
   456‚Üí                    company=data.get('company', ''),
   457‚Üí                    location=data.get('location', ''),
   458‚Üí                    profile_url=data.get('profile_url', '')
   459‚Üí                ))
   460‚Üí
   461‚Üí        # For candidates missing profile_url, click their avatar/name on the current page
   462‚Üí        missing_url = [c for c in candidates if not c.profile_url]
   463‚Üí        if missing_url:
   464‚Üí            logger.info(f"{len(missing_url)} candidates missing profile_url, clicking avatars to resolve")
   465‚Üí            search_page_url = page.url
   466‚Üí            for c in missing_url:
   467‚Üí                try:
   468‚Üí                    profile_url = await _click_avatar_for_profile_url(page, c.name, c.company)
   469‚Üí                    if profile_url:
   470‚Üí                        c.profile_url = profile_url
   471‚Üí                        logger.info(f"Resolved profile_url for '{c.name}': {profile_url}")
   472‚Üí                    else:
   473‚Üí                        logger.debug(f"Could not resolve profile_url for '{c.name}'")
   474‚Üí                    # Navigate back to search results page
   475‚Üí                    await page.goto(search_page_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   476‚Üí                    await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
   477‚Üí                except Exception as e:
   478‚Üí                    logger.debug(f"Click-avatar failed for '{c.name}': {e}")
   479‚Üí                    try:
   480‚Üí                        await page.goto(search_page_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   481‚Üí                        await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
   482‚Üí                    except Exception:
   483‚Üí                        pass
   484‚Üí
   485‚Üí        # Fallback: Strategy 1 - Find all profile links directly
   486‚Üí        profile_links = []
   487‚Üí        if not candidates:
   488‚Üí            profile_links = await page.query_selector_all('a[href*="/contact/"], a[href*="/u/"], a[href*="egid="], a[href*="profile"]')
   489‚Üí
   490‚Üí        if profile_links and not candidates:
   491‚Üí            logger.debug(f"Found {len(profile_links)} profile links")
   492‚Üí
   493‚Üí            seen_ids = set()
   494‚Üí            for link in profile_links:
   495‚Üí                try:
   496‚Üí                    href = await link.get_attribute('href')
   497‚Üí                    if not href:
   498‚Üí                        continue
   499‚Üí
   500‚Üí                    # Extract maimai_id from URL
   501‚Üí                    maimai_id = None
   502‚Üí                    if '/contact/detail/' in href:
   503‚Üí                        maimai_id = href.split('/contact/detail/')[-1].split('?')[0].split('/')[0]
   504‚Üí                    elif '/u/' in href:
   505‚Üí                        maimai_id = href.split('/u/')[-1].split('?')[0].split('/')[0]
   506‚Üí
   507‚Üí                    if not maimai_id or maimai_id in seen_ids:
   508‚Üí                        continue
   509‚Üí                    seen_ids.add(maimai_id)
   510‚Üí
   511‚Üí                    # Get name from link text
   512‚Üí                    name = await link.inner_text()
   513‚Üí                    name = name.strip()
   514‚Üí                    if not name or len(name) > 50:  # Skip if no name or too long (probably not a name)
   515‚Üí                        continue
   516‚Üí
   517‚Üí                    # Try to get parent container for more info
   518‚Üí                    parent = await link.evaluate_handle('el => el.closest("div, li, article") || el.parentElement.parentElement')
   519‚Üí
   520‚Üí                    title = ""
   521‚Üí                    company = ""
   522‚Üí
   523‚Üí                    if parent:
   524‚Üí                        # Get all text content and try to parse
   525‚Üí                        try:
   526‚Üí                            full_text = await parent.inner_text()
   527‚Üí                            lines = [l.strip() for l in full_text.split('\n') if l.strip()]
   528‚Üí
   529‚Üí                            # Usually: name, then title/company info
   530‚Üí                            for line in lines:
   531‚Üí                                if line == name:
   532‚Üí                                    continue
   533‚Üí                                if 'Â•ΩÂèã' in line or 'ÂÖ≥Ê≥®' in line:
   534‚Üí                                    continue
   535‚Üí                                if not title and len(line) < 50:
   536‚Üí                                    title = line
   537‚Üí                                elif not company and len(line) < 50:
   538‚Üí                                    company = line
   539‚Üí                                    break
   540‚Üí                        except Exception:
   541‚Üí                            pass
   542‚Üí
   543‚Üí                    profile_url = href if href.startswith('http') else f"https://maimai.cn{href}"
   544‚Üí
   545‚Üí                    candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
   546‚Üí                        maimai_id=maimai_id,
   547‚Üí                        name=name,
   548‚Üí                        title=title,
   549‚Üí                        company=company,
   550‚Üí                        profile_url=profile_url
   551‚Üí                    ))
   552‚Üí
   553‚Üí                except Exception as e:
   554‚Üí                    logger.debug(f"Failed to extract from link: {e}")
   555‚Üí                    continue
   556‚Üí
   557‚Üí        # Strategy 2: If no links found, try button-based detection
   558‚Üí        if not candidates:
   559‚Üí            logger.debug("Trying button-based detection")
   560‚Üí            buttons = await page.query_selector_all('button:has-text("Â•ΩÂèã"), button:has-text("ÂÖ≥Ê≥®")')
   561‚Üí
   562‚Üí            for button in buttons:
   563‚Üí                try:
   564‚Üí                    parent = await button.evaluate_handle('el => el.closest("div, li, article")')
   565‚Üí                    if not parent:
   566‚Üí                        continue
   567‚Üí
   568‚Üí                    # Find link in parent
   569‚Üí                    link = await parent.query_selector('a[href*="/contact"], a[href*="/u/"]')
   570‚Üí                    if link:
   571‚Üí                        href = await link.get_attribute('href')
   572‚Üí                        name = await link.inner_text()
   573‚Üí
   574‚Üí                        maimai_id = None
   575‚Üí                        if '/contact/detail/' in href:
   576‚Üí                            maimai_id = href.split('/contact/detail/')[-1].split('?')[0]
   577‚Üí                        elif '/u/' in href:
   578‚Üí                            maimai_id = href.split('/u/')[-1].split('?')[0]
   579‚Üí
   580‚Üí                        if maimai_id and name:
   581‚Üí                            candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
   582‚Üí                                maimai_id=maimai_id,
   583‚Üí                                name=name.strip(),
   584‚Üí                                title="",
   585‚Üí                                company="",
   586‚Üí                                profile_url=href
   587‚Üí                            ))
   588‚Üí                except Exception:
   589‚Üí                    continue
   590‚Üí
   591‚Üí        # Filter out premium placeholder profiles
   592‚Üí        before_filter = len(candidates)
   593‚Üí        candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.name not in PREMIUM_PLACEHOLDER_NAMES]
   594‚Üí        filtered_count = before_filter - len(candidates)
   595‚Üí        if filtered_count > 0:
   596‚Üí            logger.info(f"Filtered out {filtered_count} premium placeholder profiles")
   597‚Üí
   598‚Üí        logger.info(f"Extracted {len(candidates)} candidates from page")
   599‚Üí
   600‚Üí    except Exception as e:
   601‚Üí        logger.error(f"Error extracting search results: {e}")
   602‚Üí
   603‚Üí    return candidates

   606‚Üídef _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates: List[CandidateBasic], source_search: str) -> None:
   607‚Üí    """
   608‚Üí    Save or update candidates in database.
   609‚Üí
   610‚Üí    Args:
   611‚Üí        db_manager: Database manager instance
   612‚Üí        candidates: List of candidates to save
   613‚Üí        source_search: Search keywords that found these candidates
   614‚Üí    """
   615‚Üí    try:
   616‚Üí        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   617‚Üí            for c in candidates:
   618‚Üí                # Check if candidate exists by maimai_id
   619‚Üí                existing = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(maimai_id=c.maimai_id).first()
   620‚Üí
   621‚Üí                # Also check by name+company to avoid creating duplicates with different generated IDs
   622‚Üí                if not existing:
   623‚Üí                    existing = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(
   624‚Üí                        name=c.name, company=c.company
   625‚Üí                    ).first()
   626‚Üí
   627‚Üí                if existing:
   628‚Üí                    # Update existing
   629‚Üí                    existing.name = c.name
   630‚Üí                    existing.title = c.title
   631‚Üí                    existing.company = c.company
   632‚Üí                    existing.location = c.location
   633‚Üí                    existing.profile_url = c.profile_url
   634‚Üí                else:
   635‚Üí                    # Create new
   636‚Üí                    candidate = Candidate(
   637‚Üí                        maimai_id=c.maimai_id,
   638‚Üí                        name=c.name,
   639‚Üí                        title=c.title,
   640‚Üí                        company=c.company,
   641‚Üí                        location=c.location,
   642‚Üí                        profile_url=c.profile_url,
   643‚Üí                        source_search=source_search
   644‚Üí                    )
   645‚Üí                    session.add(candidate)
   646‚Üí
   647‚Üí            logger.debug(f"Saved {len(candidates)} candidates to database")
   648‚Üí
   649‚Üí    except Exception as e:
   650‚Üí        logger.error(f"Failed to save candidates: {e}")
   651‚Üí
   652‚Üí
   653‚Üídef _log_search_history(
   654‚Üí    db_manager,
   655‚Üí    keywords: str,
   656‚Üí    company: Optional[tuple],
   657‚Üí    location: Optional[str],
   658‚Üí    pages: int,
   659‚Üí    results_count: int
   660‚Üí) -> None:
   661‚Üí    """Log search to history table."""
   662‚Üí    try:
   663‚Üí        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   664‚Üí            history = SearchHistory(
   665‚Üí                criteria={
   666‚Üí                    'keywords': keywords,
   667‚Üí                    'company': list(company) if company else None,
   668‚Üí                    'location': location,
   669‚Üí                    'pages': pages
   670‚Üí                },
   671‚Üí                results_count=results_count
   672‚Üí            )
   673‚Üí            session.add(history)
   674‚Üí    except Exception as e:
   675‚Üí        logger.error(f"Failed to log search history: {e}")
   676‚Üí

   678‚Üíasync def _click_avatar_for_profile_url(page: Page, name: str, company: str) -> Optional[str]:
   679‚Üí    """Click a candidate's avatar/name on the current search results page to get their profile URL.
   680‚Üí
   681‚Üí    Finds the candidate card matching name (and optionally company), clicks the
   682‚Üí    avatar or name element, waits for navigation to the profile page, and returns
   683‚Üí    the full profile URL.
   684‚Üí
   685‚Üí    Args:
   686‚Üí        page: Playwright page on the search results
   687‚Üí        name: Candidate name to match
   688‚Üí        company: Candidate company to help disambiguate
   689‚Üí
   690‚Üí    Returns:
   691‚Üí        Profile URL string, or None if not found
   692‚Üí    """
   693‚Üí    try:
   694‚Üí        # Use JS to find the index of the matching avatar image
   695‚Üí        avatar_index = await page.evaluate('''(args) => {
   696‚Üí            const { name, company } = args;
   697‚Üí            const images = document.querySelectorAll('img');
   698‚Üí            let idx = 0;
   699‚Üí
   700‚Üí            for (const img of images) {
   701‚Üí                const rect = img.getBoundingClientRect();
   702‚Üí                if (rect.width > 100 || rect.height > 100) continue;
   703‚Üí                if (rect.width < 20 || rect.height < 20) continue;
   704‚Üí
   705‚Üí                // Find parent card
   706‚Üí                let card = img.parentElement;
   707‚Üí                for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
   708‚Üí                    const cardRect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
   709‚Üí                    if (cardRect.width > 200 && cardRect.height > 50 && cardRect.height < 200) {
   710‚Üí                        break;
   711‚Üí                    }
   712‚Üí                    card = card.parentElement;
   713‚Üí                }
   714‚Üí                if (!card) { idx++; continue; }
   715‚Üí
   716‚Üí                const cardText = card.textContent || '';
   717‚Üí                if (!cardText.includes(name)) { idx++; continue; }
   718‚Üí                if (company && !cardText.includes(company)) { idx++; continue; }
   719‚Üí
   720‚Üí                // Return the index among all avatar-sized images
   721‚Üí                return idx;
   722‚Üí            }
   723‚Üí            return -1;
   724‚Üí        }''', {'name': name, 'company': company})
   725‚Üí
   726‚Üí        if avatar_index < 0:
   727‚Üí            logger.debug(f"Avatar not found on page for '{name}'")
   728‚Üí            return None
   729‚Üí
   730‚Üí        # Click the avatar image at the found index
   731‚Üí        # Re-select all avatar-sized images and click the one at avatar_index
   732‚Üí        clicked = await page.evaluate('''(idx) => {
   733‚Üí            const images = document.querySelectorAll('img');
   734‚Üí            let count = 0;
   735‚Üí            for (const img of images) {
   736‚Üí                const rect = img.getBoundingClientRect();
   737‚Üí                if (rect.width > 100 || rect.height > 100) continue;
   738‚Üí                if (rect.width < 20 || rect.height < 20) continue;
   739‚Üí                if (count === idx) {
   740‚Üí                    // Try to find a clickable parent <a>
   741‚Üí                    let el = img;
   742‚Üí                    while (el) {
   743‚Üí                        if (el.tagName === 'A' && el.href) {
   744‚Üí                            el.click();
   745‚Üí                            return true;
   746‚Üí                        }
   747‚Üí                        el = el.parentElement;
   748‚Üí                    }
   749‚Üí                    // No <a> found, click the image directly
   750‚Üí                    img.click();
   751‚Üí                    return true;
   752‚Üí                }
   753‚Üí                count++;
   754‚Üí            }
   755‚Üí            return false;
   756‚Üí        }''', avatar_index)
   757‚Üí
   758‚Üí        if not clicked:
   759‚Üí            logger.debug(f"Could not click avatar for '{name}'")
   760‚Üí            return None
   761‚Üí
   762‚Üí        # Wait for navigation to profile page
   763‚Üí        try:
   764‚Üí            await page.wait_for_url(
   765‚Üí                lambda url: '/profile/detail' in url or 'dstu=' in url,
   766‚Üí                timeout=8000,
   767‚Üí            )
   768‚Üí        except Exception:
   769‚Üí            # URL might not change if it opens in a new tab or overlay
   770‚Üí            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   771‚Üí
   772‚Üí        current_url = page.url
   773‚Üí        if '/profile/detail' in current_url or 'dstu=' in current_url:
   774‚Üí            logger.info(f"Navigated to profile for '{name}': {current_url}")
   775‚Üí            return current_url
   776‚Üí
   777‚Üí        logger.debug(f"Clicked avatar but did not land on profile page: {current_url}")
   778‚Üí        return None
   779‚Üí
   780‚Üí    except Exception as e:
   781‚Üí        logger.debug(f"_click_avatar_for_profile_url error for '{name}': {e}")
   782‚Üí        return None
   783‚Üí
   784‚Üí
   785‚Üí# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   786‚Üí# Enterprise recruitment path (Path B)
   787‚Üí# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   788‚Üí
   789‚ÜíMAIMAI_HOME_URL = "https://maimai.cn"
   790‚ÜíENTERPRISE_URL_MARKER = "ent/talents/discover"
   791‚Üí
   792‚Üí
   793‚Üíasync def search_candidates_enterprise(
   794‚Üí    keywords: str,
   795‚Üí    company: Optional[tuple] = None,
   796‚Üí    pages: int = 1,
   797‚Üí    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   798‚Üí    keep_tab_open: bool = False,
   799‚Üí) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   800‚Üí    """Search for candidates via the enterprise recruitment path.
   801‚Üí
   802‚Üí    Flow:
   803‚Üí    1. Switch to primary tab -> navigate to homepage -> click "ÊãõËÅò" tab (opens new tab)
   804‚Üí    2. Wait for enterprise page to load
   805‚Üí    3. Add keyword filter -> submit
   806‚Üí    4. Optionally add company filter
   807‚Üí    5. Extract candidates from enterprise card layout
   808‚Üí    6. For additional pages, scroll to trigger infinite scroll
   809‚Üí    7. Close enterprise tab unless keep_tab_open is True
   810‚Üí
   811‚Üí    Args:
   812‚Üí        keywords: Search keywords
   813‚Üí        company: Filter by company names (optional)
   814‚Üí        pages: Number of scroll-pages to extract
   815‚Üí        browser: Browser manager instance
   816‚Üí        keep_tab_open: If True, leave enterprise tab open (for inline messaging)
   817‚Üí
   818‚Üí    Returns:
   819‚Üí        List of CandidateBasic objects
   820‚Üí    """
   821‚Üí    validate_keywords(keywords)
   822‚Üí
   823‚Üí    if browser is None:
   824‚Üí        browser = get_browser_manager()
   825‚Üí
   826‚Üí    config = get_config()
   827‚Üí    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   828‚Üí    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   829‚Üí
   830‚Üí    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   831‚Üí
   832‚Üí    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   833‚Üí    enterprise_tab_opened = False
   834‚Üí
   835‚Üí    with Progress(
   836‚Üí        SpinnerColumn(),
   837‚Üí        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
   838‚Üí        console=console,
   839‚Üí    ) as progress:
   840‚Üí        task = progress.add_task("Opening enterprise recruitment...", total=None)
   841‚Üí
   842‚Üí        try:
   843‚Üí            await async_check_rate_limit("search")
   844‚Üí
   845‚Üí            # Always start from the primary tab to avoid navigating user's open content
   846‚Üí            browser.switch_to_primary_tab()
   847‚Üí            page = browser.page
   848‚Üí
   849‚Üí            # Step 1: Navigate to homepage and click ÊãõËÅò tab
   850‚Üí            await retry_navigation(page, MAIMAI_HOME_URL, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
   851‚Üí            await async_random_delay("page_load")
   852‚Üí
   853‚Üí            sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.recruitment_tab")
   854‚Üí            recruitment_tab = await page.wait_for_selector(sel, timeout=5000)
   855‚Üí            if not recruitment_tab:
   856‚Üí                raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Could not find recruitment tab: {sel}")
   857‚Üí
   858‚Üí            # Click opens a new tab ‚Äî use BrowserManager API
   859‚Üí            await recruitment_tab.click()
   860‚Üí            page = await browser.wait_for_new_tab(timeout=15000)
   861‚Üí            enterprise_tab_opened = True
   862‚Üí
   863‚Üí            progress.update(task, description="Enterprise page loaded")
   864‚Üí
   865‚Üí            # Wait for the enterprise page URL
   866‚Üí            try:
   867‚Üí                await page.wait_for_url(
   868‚Üí                    lambda url: ENTERPRISE_URL_MARKER in url,
   869‚Üí                    timeout=15000,
   870‚Üí                )
   871‚Üí            except Exception:
   872‚Üí                logger.warning(f"Enterprise URL marker not found, current URL: {page.url}")
   873‚Üí
   874‚Üí            await async_random_delay("action")
   875‚Üí
   876‚Üí            # Step 2: Add keyword
   877‚Üí            progress.update(task, description=f"Adding keyword: {keywords}")
   878‚Üí
   879‚Üí            add_kw_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.add_keyword_button")
   880‚Üí            add_kw_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(add_kw_sel, timeout=5000)
   881‚Üí            if add_kw_btn:
   882‚Üí                await add_kw_btn.click()
   883‚Üí                await async_random_delay("action")
   884‚Üí
   885‚Üí            kw_input_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.keyword_input")
   886‚Üí            await page.wait_for_selector(kw_input_sel, timeout=5000)
   887‚Üí            await human_type(page, kw_input_sel, keywords)
   888‚Üí            await async_random_delay("action")
   889‚Üí
   890‚Üí            kw_submit_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.keyword_submit")
   891‚Üí            submit_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(kw_submit_sel, timeout=3000)
   892‚Üí            if submit_btn:
   893‚Üí                await submit_btn.click()
   894‚Üí                await async_random_delay("page_load")
   895‚Üí
   896‚Üí            # Step 3: Add company filter if specified
   897‚Üí            if company:
   898‚Üí                progress.update(task, description="Adding company filter...")
   899‚Üí                add_co_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.add_company_button")
   900‚Üí                add_co_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(add_co_sel, timeout=5000)
   901‚Üí                if add_co_btn:
   902‚Üí                    await add_co_btn.click()
   903‚Üí                    await async_random_delay("action")
   904‚Üí
   905‚Üí                co_input_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.company_input")
   906‚Üí                for co_name in company:
   907‚Üí                    await page.wait_for_selector(co_input_sel, timeout=5000)
   908‚Üí                    await human_type(page, co_input_sel, co_name)
   909‚Üí                    await async_random_delay("action")
   910‚Üí
   911‚Üí                    # Click suggestion dropdown item
   912‚Üí                    try:
   913‚Üí                        suggestion = await page.wait_for_selector(
   914‚Üí                            f"text='{co_name}'", timeout=3000
   915‚Üí                        )
   916‚Üí                        if suggestion:
   917‚Üí                            await suggestion.click()
   918‚Üí                            await async_random_delay("action")
   919‚Üí                    except Exception:
   920‚Üí                        logger.debug(f"Company suggestion not found for: {co_name}")
   921‚Üí
   922‚Üí            # Step 4: Wait for results and extract
   923‚Üí            await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
   924‚Üí            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   925‚Üí
   926‚Üí            for page_num in range(1, pages + 1):
   927‚Üí                progress.update(task, description=f"Extracting page {page_num}/{pages}...")
   928‚Üí
   929‚Üí                candidates = await _extract_enterprise_results(page)
   930‚Üí
   931‚Üí                if not candidates:
   932‚Üí                    logger.info(f"No enterprise results on page {page_num}")
   933‚Üí                    break
   934‚Üí
   935‚Üí                # Filter non-R&D roles
   936‚Üí                before_filter = len(candidates)
   937‚Üí                candidates = [c for c in candidates if not _is_non_rd_title(c.title)]
   938‚Üí                filtered = before_filter - len(candidates)
   939‚Üí                if filtered > 0:
   940‚Üí                    logger.info(f"Filtered out {filtered} non-R&D candidates")
   941‚Üí
   942‚Üí                all_candidates.extend(candidates)
   943‚Üí                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Found {len(candidates)} candidates")
   944‚Üí
   945‚Üí                rate_limiter.log_action("search", {
   946‚Üí                    "keywords": keywords,
   947‚Üí                    "page": page_num,
   948‚Üí                    "results": len(candidates),
   949‚Üí                    "mode": "enterprise",
   950‚Üí                })
   951‚Üí
   952‚Üí                _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates, keywords)
   953‚Üí
   954‚Üí                # Scroll for next page (infinite scroll)
   955‚Üí                if page_num < pages:
   956‚Üí                    await human_scroll(page, "down", distance=800)
   957‚Üí                    await async_random_delay("page_load")
   958‚Üí                    await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   959‚Üí
   960‚Üí        except Exception as e:
   961‚Üí            logger.error(f"Enterprise search error: {e}")
   962‚Üí            await browser.screenshot("enterprise_search_error")
   963‚Üí            progress.update(task, description=f"Error: {str(e)[:40]}")
   964‚Üí        finally:
   965‚Üí            # Close the enterprise tab unless caller wants it open for inline messaging
   966‚Üí            if enterprise_tab_opened and not keep_tab_open:
   967‚Üí                try:
   968‚Üí                    await browser.close_current_tab()
   969‚Üí                except Exception:
   970‚Üí                    pass
   971‚Üí
   972‚Üí    _log_search_history(db_manager, keywords, company, None, pages, len(all_candidates))
   973‚Üí
   974‚Üí    console.print(f"[green]Enterprise search complete. Found {len(all_candidates)} candidates.[/green]")
   975‚Üí    return all_candidates
   976‚Üí
   977‚Üí
   978‚Üíasync def _extract_enterprise_results(page: Page) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   979‚Üí    """Extract candidate information from enterprise recruitment results page.
   980‚Üí
   981‚Üí    The enterprise UI has a different card layout from search_center.
   982‚Üí    Uses JS-based extraction tailored to the enterprise talent cards.
   983‚Üí
   984‚Üí    Args:
   985‚Üí        page: Playwright page instance on the enterprise results page
   986‚Üí
   987‚Üí    Returns:
   988‚Üí        List of CandidateBasic objects
   989‚Üí    """
   990‚Üí    candidates = []
   991‚Üí
   992‚Üí    try:
   993‚Üí        await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=10000)
   994‚Üí    except Exception:
   995‚Üí        pass
   996‚Üí
   997‚Üí    try:
   998‚Üí        candidates_data = await page.evaluate('''() => {
   999‚Üí            const candidates = [];
  1000‚Üí            const seenIds = new Set();
  1001‚Üí
  1002‚Üí            // Enterprise talent cards typically have a structured layout
  1003‚Üí            // Try multiple selectors for the card containers
  1004‚Üí            const cardSelectors = [
  1005‚Üí                '[class*="talent-card"]',
  1006‚Üí                '[class*="candidate-card"]',
  1007‚Üí                '[class*="recommend-card"]',
  1008‚Üí                '[class*="talent-item"]',
  1009‚Üí                '[class*="card-wrap"]',
  1010‚Üí            ];
  1011‚Üí
  1012‚Üí            let cards = [];
  1013‚Üí            for (const sel of cardSelectors) {
  1014‚Üí                cards = document.querySelectorAll(sel);
  1015‚Üí                if (cards.length > 0) break;
  1016‚Üí            }
  1017‚Üí
  1018‚Üí            // Fallback: find cards by avatar image pattern (same as search_center)
  1019‚Üí            if (cards.length === 0) {
  1020‚Üí                const images = document.querySelectorAll('img');
  1021‚Üí                const foundCards = [];
  1022‚Üí
  1023‚Üí                for (const img of images) {
  1024‚Üí                    const rect = img.getBoundingClientRect();
  1025‚Üí                    if (rect.width > 100 || rect.height > 100) continue;
  1026‚Üí                    if (rect.width < 30 || rect.height < 30) continue;
  1027‚Üí
  1028‚Üí                    let card = img.parentElement;
  1029‚Üí                    for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
  1030‚Üí                        const cardRect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
  1031‚Üí                        if (cardRect.width > 200 && cardRect.height > 80) {
  1032‚Üí                            break;
  1033‚Üí                        }
  1034‚Üí                        card = card.parentElement;
  1035‚Üí                    }
  1036‚Üí                    if (card) foundCards.push(card);
  1037‚Üí                }
  1038‚Üí                cards = foundCards;
  1039‚Üí            }
  1040‚Üí
  1041‚Üí            for (const card of cards) {
  1042‚Üí                const textParts = [];
  1043‚Üí                const walker = document.createTreeWalker(card, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT, null, false);
  1044‚Üí                while (walker.nextNode()) {
  1045‚Üí                    const text = walker.currentNode.textContent.trim();
  1046‚Üí                    if (text && text.length > 0 && text.length < 100) {
  1047‚Üí                        textParts.push(text);
  1048‚Üí                    }
  1049‚Üí                }
  1050‚Üí
  1051‚Üí                let name = '';
  1052‚Üí                let company = '';
  1053‚Üí                let title = '';
  1054‚Üí
  1055‚Üí                const skipPatterns = [
  1056‚Üí                    /^Á´ãÂç≥Ê≤üÈÄö$/,
  1057‚Üí                    /^‰∏çÂêàÈÄÇ$/,
  1058‚Üí                    /^ÊÑüÂÖ¥Ë∂£$/,
  1059‚Üí                    /^‰∏çÊÑüÂÖ¥Ë∂£$/,
  1060‚Üí                    /^(\\d+\\s*)?Âπ¥/,
  1061‚Üí                    /^[|ÔΩú¬∑]$/,
  1062‚Üí                    /^Âú®Á∫ø|^Á¶ªÁ∫ø|^Ê¥ªË∑É/,
  1063‚Üí                ];
  1064‚Üí
  1065‚Üí                const isSkippable = (text) => {
  1066‚Üí                    return skipPatterns.some(p => p.test(text));
  1067‚Üí                };
  1068‚Üí
  1069‚Üí                for (let i = 0; i < textParts.length; i++) {
  1070‚Üí                    const part = textParts[i];
  1071‚Üí                    if (isSkippable(part)) continue;
  1072‚Üí
  1073‚Üí                    if (!name && part.length >= 2 && part.length <= 15) {
  1074‚Üí                        if (/^[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5a-zA-Z¬∑\\s]+$/.test(part)) {
  1075‚Üí                            name = part;
  1076‚Üí                            continue;
  1077‚Üí                        }
  1078‚Üí                    }
  1079‚Üí
  1080‚Üí                    if (name && !company && part.length > 1) {
  1081‚Üí                        company = part;
  1082‚Üí                        continue;
  1083‚Üí                    }
  1084‚Üí
  1085‚Üí                    if (name && company && !title && part.length > 1) {
  1086‚Üí                        title = part;
  1087‚Üí                        break;
  1088‚Üí                    }
  1089‚Üí                }
  1090‚Üí
  1091‚Üí                if (!name) continue;
  1092‚Üí
  1093‚Üí                const idSource = (name || '') + '|' + (company || '') + '|' + (title || '');
  1094‚Üí                let hash = 0;
  1095‚Üí                for (let j = 0; j < idSource.length; j++) {
  1096‚Üí                    const ch = idSource.charCodeAt(j);
  1097‚Üí                    hash = ((hash << 5) - hash) + ch;
  1098‚Üí                    hash = hash & hash;
  1099‚Üí                }
  1100‚Üí                const maimaiId = 'mm_' + Math.abs(hash).toString(16).padStart(8, '0');
  1101‚Üí
  1102‚Üí                if (seenIds.has(maimaiId)) continue;
  1103‚Üí                seenIds.add(maimaiId);
  1104‚Üí
  1105‚Üí                // Try to extract profile URL
  1106‚Üí                let profileUrl = '';
  1107‚Üí                const links = card.querySelectorAll('a[href]');
  1108‚Üí                for (const link of links) {
  1109‚Üí                    const href = link.getAttribute('href') || '';
  1110‚Üí                    if (href.includes('/profile/detail') || href.includes('/contact/detail/') || href.includes('dstu=') || href.includes('egid=')) {
  1111‚Üí                        profileUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
  1112‚Üí                        break;
  1113‚Üí                    }
  1114‚Üí                }
  1115‚Üí
  1116‚Üí                candidates.push({
  1117‚Üí                    name: name,
  1118‚Üí                    title: title || '',
  1119‚Üí                    company: company || '',
  1120‚Üí                    maimai_id: maimaiId,
  1121‚Üí                    profile_url: profileUrl,
  1122‚Üí                    location: '',
  1123‚Üí                });
  1124‚Üí            }
  1125‚Üí
  1126‚Üí            return candidates;
  1127‚Üí        }''')
  1128‚Üí
  1129‚Üí        logger.info(f"Enterprise extraction found {len(candidates_data)} candidates")
  1130‚Üí
  1131‚Üí        for data in candidates_data:
  1132‚Üí            if data.get("name"):
  1133‚Üí                candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
  1134‚Üí                    maimai_id=data.get("maimai_id", ""),
  1135‚Üí                    name=data.get("name", ""),
  1136‚Üí                    title=data.get("title", ""),
  1137‚Üí                    company=data.get("company", ""),
  1138‚Üí                    location=data.get("location", ""),
  1139‚Üí                    profile_url=data.get("profile_url", ""),
  1140‚Üí                ))
  1141‚Üí
  1142‚Üí        # Filter out premium placeholders
  1143‚Üí        candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.name not in PREMIUM_PLACEHOLDER_NAMES]
  1144‚Üí
  1145‚Üí        logger.info(f"Enterprise: extracted {len(candidates)} candidates from page")
  1146‚Üí
  1147‚Üí    except Exception as e:
  1148‚Üí        logger.error(f"Error extracting enterprise results: {e}")
  1149‚Üí
  1150‚Üí    return candidates
  1151‚Üí
