  1241‚Üíasync def send_message_batch_enterprise(
  1242‚Üí    page: Page,
  1243‚Üí    candidates: List[dict],
  1244‚Üí    template_name: str,
  1245‚Üí    common_variables: Dict[str, str],
  1246‚Üí    browser: 'BrowserManager',
  1247‚Üí    skip_messaged: bool = True,
  1248‚Üí) -> Dict[str, Any]:
  1249‚Üí    """Batch send messages inline on the enterprise recruitment page.
  1250‚Üí
  1251‚Üí    Iterates visible candidate cards on the enterprise results page,
  1252‚Üí    sending messages inline without navigating to separate chat pages.
  1253‚Üí
  1254‚Üí    Args:
  1255‚Üí        page: Playwright page on the enterprise results page
  1256‚Üí        candidates: List of candidate dicts with maimai_id, name, company, title
  1257‚Üí        template_name: Template name to use
  1258‚Üí        common_variables: Shared template variables
  1259‚Üí        browser: Browser manager instance
  1260‚Üí        skip_messaged: Skip already-messaged candidates
  1261‚Üí
  1262‚Üí    Returns:
  1263‚Üí        Dict with total, sent, failed, skipped, rate_limited counts
  1264‚Üí    """
  1265‚Üí    config = get_config()
  1266‚Üí    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
  1267‚Üí    db_manager = get_db_manager()
  1268‚Üí
  1269‚Üí    try:
  1270‚Üí        template = config.get_template(template_name)
  1271‚Üí    except Exception:
  1272‚Üí        raise ValidationError(f"Template not found: {template_name}")
  1273‚Üí
  1274‚Üí    results = {
  1275‚Üí        "total": len(candidates),
  1276‚Üí        "sent": 0,
  1277‚Üí        "failed": 0,
  1278‚Üí        "skipped": 0,
  1279‚Üí        "rate_limited": 0,
  1280‚Üí        "details": [],
  1281‚Üí    }
  1282‚Üí
  1283‚Üí    # Filter already-messaged
  1284‚Üí    send_list = []
  1285‚Üí    for c in candidates:
  1286‚Üí        if skip_messaged:
  1287‚Üí            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
  1288‚Üí                existing_msg = session.query(Message).filter_by(
  1289‚Üí                    candidate_maimai_id=c["maimai_id"],
  1290‚Üí                    status="sent",
  1291‚Üí                ).first()
  1292‚Üí                if existing_msg:
  1293‚Üí                    results["skipped"] += 1
  1294‚Üí                    results["details"].append({
  1295‚Üí                        "maimai_id": c["maimai_id"],
  1296‚Üí                        "name": c["name"],
  1297‚Üí                        "status": "skipped",
  1298‚Üí                        "reason": "already messaged",
  1299‚Üí                    })
  1300‚Üí                    continue
  1301‚Üí        send_list.append(c)
  1302‚Üí
  1303‚Üí    if not send_list:
  1304‚Üí        console.print("[yellow]No candidates to send messages to.[/yellow]")
  1305‚Üí        return results
  1306‚Üí
  1307‚Üí    # Build preview
  1308‚Üí    first = send_list[0]
  1309‚Üí    first_vars = {
  1310‚Üí        **common_variables,
  1311‚Üí        "name": first["name"],
  1312‚Üí        "company": first["company"],
  1313‚Üí        "position": first["title"],
  1314‚Üí    }
  1315‚Üí    first_content = render_template(template["content"], first_vars)
  1316‚Üí
  1317‚Üí    # Display summary
  1318‚Üí    from rich.table import Table as RichTable
  1319‚Üí
  1320‚Üí    summary_text = Text()
  1321‚Üí    summary_text.append("Template: ", style="bold")
  1322‚Üí    summary_text.append(f"{template_name}\n")
  1323‚Üí    summary_text.append("Mode: ", style="bold")
  1324‚Üí    summary_text.append("Enterprise Inline\n")
  1325‚Üí    summary_text.append("Candidates: ", style="bold")
  1326‚Üí    summary_text.append(f"{len(candidates)} found, {results['skipped']} already messaged\n")
  1327‚Üí    summary_text.append("Will send to: ", style="bold")
  1328‚Üí    summary_text.append(f"{len(send_list)} candidates\n\n")
  1329‚Üí    summary_text.append("Message Preview ", style="bold cyan")
  1330‚Üí    summary_text.append(f"(first candidate):\n", style="dim")
  1331‚Üí    summary_text.append("To: ", style="bold cyan")
  1332‚Üí    recipient = first["name"]
  1333‚Üí    if first.get("title") and first.get("company"):
  1334‚Üí        recipient += f" ({first['title']} @ {first['company']})"
  1335‚Üí    summary_text.append(f"{recipient}\n\n")
  1336‚Üí    summary_text.append(first_content)
  1337‚Üí
  1338‚Üí    console.print(Panel(
  1339‚Üí        summary_text,
  1340‚Üí        title="Enterprise Pipeline Summary",
  1341‚Üí        border_style="green",
  1342‚Üí        padding=(1, 2),
  1343‚Üí    ))
  1344‚Üí
  1345‚Üí    # Confirmation
  1346‚Üí    loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
  1347‚Üí    confirm = await loop.run_in_executor(
  1348‚Üí        None,
  1349‚Üí        lambda: questionary.confirm(
  1350‚Üí            f"Confirm batch send to {len(send_list)} candidates?"
  1351‚Üí        ).unsafe_ask(),
  1352‚Üí    )
  1353‚Üí
  1354‚Üí    if not confirm:
  1355‚Üí        console.print("[yellow]Batch send cancelled.[/yellow]")
  1356‚Üí        return results
  1357‚Üí
  1358‚Üí    # Send messages
  1359‚Üí    from rich.progress import Progress, BarColumn, TextColumn as ProgressTextColumn, MofNCompleteColumn
  1360‚Üí
  1361‚Üí    with Progress(
  1362‚Üí        ProgressTextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
  1363‚Üí        BarColumn(),
  1364‚Üí        MofNCompleteColumn(),
  1365‚Üí        console=console,
  1366‚Üí    ) as progress:
  1367‚Üí        task = progress.add_task("Sending messages (enterprise)...", total=len(send_list))
  1368‚Üí
  1369‚Üí        for c in send_list:
  1370‚Üí            # Rate limit check
  1371‚Üí            try:
  1372‚Üí                await async_check_rate_limit("send_message")
  1373‚Üí            except RateLimitExceededError as e:
  1374‚Üí                console.print(f"\n[yellow]Rate limit reached: {e}[/yellow]")
  1375‚Üí                remaining = len(send_list) - (results["sent"] + results["failed"])
  1376‚Üí                results["rate_limited"] = remaining
  1377‚Üí                results["details"].append({
  1378‚Üí                    "maimai_id": c["maimai_id"],
  1379‚Üí                    "name": c["name"],
  1380‚Üí                    "status": "rate_limited",
  1381‚Üí                    "reason": str(e),
  1382‚Üí                })
  1383‚Üí                break
  1384‚Üí
  1385‚Üí            # Build per-candidate variables
  1386‚Üí            variables = {
  1387‚Üí                **common_variables,
  1388‚Üí                "name": c["name"],
  1389‚Üí                "company": c["company"],
  1390‚Üí                "position": c["title"],
  1391‚Üí            }
  1392‚Üí            content = render_template(template["content"], variables)
  1393‚Üí
  1394‚Üí            # Scroll to find the candidate card (by name match)
  1395‚Üí            try:
  1396‚Üí                card_locator = page.get_by_text(c["name"], exact=False).first
  1397‚Üí                await card_locator.scroll_into_view_if_needed(timeout=5000)
  1398‚Üí                await async_random_delay("action")
  1399‚Üí            except Exception as e:
  1400‚Üí                logger.warning(f"Could not scroll to card for '{c['name']}': {e}")
  1401‚Üí
  1402‚Üí            # Send inline
  1403‚Üí            success = await send_message_enterprise_inline(page, content, config)
  1404‚Üí
  1405‚Üí            if success:
  1406‚Üí                results["sent"] += 1
  1407‚Üí                results["details"].append({
  1408‚Üí                    "maimai_id": c["maimai_id"],
  1409‚Üí                    "name": c["name"],
  1410‚Üí                    "status": "sent",
  1411‚Üí                })
  1412‚Üí                rate_limiter.log_action("send_message", {
  1413‚Üí                    "maimai_id": c["maimai_id"],
  1414‚Üí                    "template": template_name,
  1415‚Üí                    "mode": "enterprise",
  1416‚Üí                })
  1417‚Üí                _log_message(db_manager, c["maimai_id"], template_name, content, "sent")
  1418‚Üí            else:
  1419‚Üí                results["failed"] += 1
  1420‚Üí                results["details"].append({
  1421‚Üí                    "maimai_id": c["maimai_id"],
  1422‚Üí                    "name": c["name"],
  1423‚Üí                    "status": "failed",
  1424‚Üí                    "reason": "inline send returned False",
  1425‚Üí                })
  1426‚Üí                _log_message(db_manager, c["maimai_id"], template_name, content, "failed")
  1427‚Üí
  1428‚Üí            progress.advance(task)
  1429‚Üí            await async_random_delay("message")
  1430‚Üí
  1431‚Üí    return results

1‚Üí#!/usr/bin/env python
     2‚Üí"""Main CLI entry point for Maimai Assistant."""
     3‚Üí
     4‚Üíimport sys
     5‚Üíimport asyncio
     6‚Üífrom pathlib import Path
     7‚Üí
     8‚Üíimport click
     9‚Üífrom rich.console import Console
    10‚Üífrom rich.table import Table
    11‚Üí
    12‚Üí# Add src to path
    13‚Üísys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).parent.parent.parent))
    14‚Üí
    15‚Üífrom src.utils.logger import setup_logger
    16‚Üífrom src.utils.config import get_config
    17‚Üífrom src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter
    18‚Üífrom src.utils.delays import reset_session as reset_delay_session
    19‚Üífrom src.exceptions.errors import MaimaiAssistantError
    20‚Üí
    21‚Üíconsole = Console()
    22‚Üí
    23‚Üí
    24‚Üídef run_async(coro):
    25‚Üí    """Run async function in sync context."""
    26‚Üí    return asyncio.run(coro)
    27‚Üí
    28‚Üí
    29‚Üídef _apply_cdp_endpoint(ctx):
    30‚Üí    """Apply CDP endpoint override from CLI --cdp flag to browser manager."""
    31‚Üí    cdp_endpoint = ctx.obj.get('cdp_endpoint') if ctx.obj else None
    32‚Üí    if cdp_endpoint:
    33‚Üí        from src.core.browser import get_browser_manager
    34‚Üí        get_browser_manager().set_cdp_endpoint(cdp_endpoint)
    35‚Üí
    36‚Üí
    37‚Üí@click.group()
    38‚Üí@click.version_option(version='0.1.0')
    39‚Üí@click.option('--cdp', 'cdp_endpoint', default=None, envvar='MAIMAI_CDP_ENDPOINT',
    40‚Üí              help='CDP endpoint URL (default: http://localhost:9222)')
    41‚Üí@click.pass_context
    42‚Üídef cli(ctx, cdp_endpoint):
    43‚Üí    """
    44‚Üí    Maimai Semi-Automated Recruitment Assistant
    45‚Üí
    46‚Üí    Connects to your Chrome browser via CDP. Start Chrome with:
    47‚Üí
    48‚Üí        /Applications/Google\\ Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google\\ Chrome --remote-debugging-port=9222
    49‚Üí
    50‚Üí    Then log in to Maimai manually before running commands.
    51‚Üí    """
    52‚Üí    try:
    53‚Üí        # Initialize configuration and logging
    54‚Üí        setup_logger()
    55‚Üí        ctx.ensure_object(dict)
    56‚Üí        ctx.obj['cdp_endpoint'] = cdp_endpoint
    57‚Üí    except Exception as e:
    58‚Üí        console.print(f"[red]Failed to initialize application: {e}[/red]")
    59‚Üí        sys.exit(1)
    60‚Üí
    61‚Üí
    62‚Üí@cli.command()
    63‚Üí@click.pass_context
    64‚Üídef login(ctx):
    65‚Üí    """
    66‚Üí    Verify login status via CDP connection.
    67‚Üí
    68‚Üí    Connects to your Chrome browser and checks if you're logged in to Maimai.
    69‚Üí    If not, waits for you to log in manually in the browser.
    70‚Üí
    71‚Üí    First, start Chrome with remote debugging:
    72‚Üí
    73‚Üí        /Applications/Google\\ Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google\\ Chrome --remote-debugging-port=9222
    74‚Üí
    75‚Üí    Then log in to Maimai in that Chrome window.
    76‚Üí    """
    77‚Üí    from src.modules.auth import login as do_login
    78‚Üí    from src.core.browser import get_browser_manager
    79‚Üí
    80‚Üí    _apply_cdp_endpoint(ctx)
    81‚Üí
    82‚Üí    async def _login():
    83‚Üí        browser = get_browser_manager()
    84‚Üí        try:
    85‚Üí            success = await do_login(browser)
    86‚Üí            if success:
    87‚Üí                console.print("[green]Login verified![/green]")
    88‚Üí            else:
    89‚Üí                console.print("[red]Login failed or timed out.[/red]")
    90‚Üí                sys.exit(1)
    91‚Üí        finally:
    92‚Üí            await browser.close()
    93‚Üí
    94‚Üí    run_async(_login())
    95‚Üí
    96‚Üí
    97‚Üí@cli.command()
    98‚Üí@click.option('--keywords', '-k', required=True, multiple=True, help='Search keywords (can specify multiple times)')
    99‚Üí@click.option('--company', '-c', multiple=True, help='Filter by company name (can specify multiple)')
   100‚Üí@click.option('--location', '-l', help='Filter by location')
   101‚Üí@click.option('--max-pages', '-p', type=int, default=1, help='Maximum pages to scrape per keyword')
   102‚Üí@click.option('--mode', '-m', type=click.Choice(['search_center', 'enterprise']), default='search_center',
   103‚Üí              help='Search mode: search_center (default) or enterprise')
   104‚Üí@click.option('--export', '-e', help='Export results to file (Excel/CSV)')
   105‚Üí@click.pass_context
   106‚Üídef search(ctx, keywords, company, location, max_pages, mode, export):
   107‚Üí    """
   108‚Üí    Search for candidates with specified criteria.
   109‚Üí
   110‚Üí    Supports multiple keywords - each will be searched separately and results merged.
   111‚Üí
   112‚Üí    Use --mode enterprise to search via the enterprise recruitment tab.
   113‚Üí
   114‚Üí    Examples:\n
   115‚Üí        maimai search -k "È´òÁ∫ßÂâçÁ´ØÂ∑•Á®ãÂ∏à" -c "ÈòøÈáåÂ∑¥Â∑¥" --max-pages 3\n
   116‚Üí        maimai search -k "ÂâçÁ´ØÂ∑•Á®ãÂ∏à" -k "ReactÂºÄÂèë" -k "VueÂ∑•Á®ãÂ∏à" -p 2\n
   117‚Üí        maimai search -k "ÁÝîÂèë" -m enterprise
   118‚Üí    """
   119‚Üí    from src.modules.export import export_candidates
   120‚Üí    from src.core.browser import get_browser_manager
   121‚Üí    from src.services.pipeline import search_all_keywords, search_all_keywords_enterprise
   122‚Üí
   123‚Üí    _apply_cdp_endpoint(ctx)
   124‚Üí
   125‚Üí    async def _search():
   126‚Üí        reset_delay_session()
   127‚Üí        browser = get_browser_manager()
   128‚Üí        try:
   129‚Üí            if mode == 'enterprise':
   130‚Üí                all_candidates, seen_ids = await search_all_keywords_enterprise(
   131‚Üí                    browser, keywords, company, max_pages
   132‚Üí                )
   133‚Üí            else:
   134‚Üí                all_candidates, seen_ids = await search_all_keywords(
   135‚Üí                    browser, keywords, company, location, max_pages
   136‚Üí                )
   137‚Üí
   138‚Üí            # Display combined results
   139‚Üí            if all_candidates:
   140‚Üí                table = Table(title=f"Search Results ({len(all_candidates)} candidates total)")
   141‚Üí                table.add_column("Name", style="cyan")
   142‚Üí                table.add_column("Title", style="green")
   143‚Üí                table.add_column("Company", style="yellow")
   144‚Üí                table.add_column("Location", style="blue")
   145‚Üí                table.add_column("ID", style="dim")
   146‚Üí
   147‚Üí                for c in all_candidates[:30]:  # Show first 30
   148‚Üí                    table.add_row(c.name, c.title, c.company, c.location or '', c.maimai_id)
   149‚Üí
   150‚Üí                console.print(table)
   151‚Üí
   152‚Üí                if len(all_candidates) > 30:
   153‚Üí                    console.print(f"[dim]... and {len(all_candidates) - 30} more[/dim]")
   154‚Üí            else:
   155‚Üí                console.print("[yellow]No candidates found for any keyword.[/yellow]")
   156‚Üí
   157‚Üí            # Export if requested
   158‚Üí            if export and all_candidates:
   159‚Üí                fmt = 'csv' if export.endswith('.csv') else 'excel'
   160‚Üí                export_candidates(format=fmt, output_path=export)
   161‚Üí
   162‚Üí        finally:
   163‚Üí            await browser.close()
   164‚Üí
   165‚Üí    run_async(_search())
   166‚Üí
   167‚Üí
   168‚Üí@cli.command()
   169‚Üí@click.argument('maimai_id')
   170‚Üí@click.pass_context
   171‚Üídef profile(ctx, maimai_id):
   172‚Üí    """
   173‚Üí    Extract detailed profile for a candidate.
   174‚Üí
   175‚Üí    Example:
   176‚Üí        maimai profile abc123
   177‚Üí    """
   178‚Üí    from src.modules.profile import extract_profile
   179‚Üí    from src.core.browser import get_browser_manager
   180‚Üí
   181‚Üí    _apply_cdp_endpoint(ctx)
   182‚Üí
   183‚Üí    async def _profile():
   184‚Üí        browser = get_browser_manager()
   185‚Üí        try:
   186‚Üí            profile_data = await extract_profile(maimai_id, browser)
   187‚Üí            # Profile display is handled in the module
   188‚Üí        finally:
   189‚Üí            await browser.close()
   190‚Üí
   191‚Üí    run_async(_profile())
   192‚Üí
   193‚Üí
   194‚Üí@cli.command()
   195‚Üí@click.argument('maimai_id')
   196‚Üí@click.option('--template', '-t', required=True, help='Message template name')
   197‚Üí@click.option('--preview', is_flag=True, help='Preview only, do not send')
   198‚Üí@click.option('--var', '-v', multiple=True, help='Template variable (format: key=value)')
   199‚Üí@click.option('--interactive', '-i', is_flag=True, help='Enable interactive selector discovery when auto-detection fails')
   200‚Üí@click.pass_context
   201‚Üídef message(ctx, maimai_id, template, preview, var, interactive):
   202‚Üí    """
   203‚Üí    Send message to a candidate (requires confirmation).
   204‚Üí
   205‚Üí    Example:
   206‚Üí        maimai message abc123 -t greeting -v name=ÂºÝ‰∏â -v recruiter_name=ÊùéÂõõ
   207‚Üí        maimai message abc123 -t follow_up --preview
   208‚Üí        maimai message abc123 -t greeting -i
   209‚Üí    """
   210‚Üí    from src.modules.message import send_message, preview_message
   211‚Üí    from src.core.browser import get_browser_manager
   212‚Üí
   213‚Üí    # Parse variables
   214‚Üí    variables = _parse_variables(var)
   215‚Üí
   216‚Üí    if preview:
   217‚Üí        # Just preview, no send
   218‚Üí        preview_message(template, variables)
   219‚Üí        return
   220‚Üí
   221‚Üí    _apply_cdp_endpoint(ctx)
   222‚Üí
   223‚Üí    async def _message():
   224‚Üí        browser = get_browser_manager()
   225‚Üí        try:
   226‚Üí            discovered_selectors = None
   227‚Üí            if interactive:
   228‚Üí                from src.modules.selector_discovery import DiscoveredSelectors
   229‚Üí                discovered_selectors = DiscoveredSelectors()
   230‚Üí
   231‚Üí            success = await send_message(
   232‚Üí                maimai_id=maimai_id,
   233‚Üí                template_name=template,
   234‚Üí                variables=variables,
   235‚Üí                browser=browser,
   236‚Üí                interactive=interactive,
   237‚Üí                discovered_selectors=discovered_selectors,
   238‚Üí            )
   239‚Üí            if not success:
   240‚Üí                sys.exit(1)
   241‚Üí        finally:
   242‚Üí            await browser.close()
   243‚Üí
   244‚Üí    run_async(_message())
   245‚Üí
   246‚Üí
   247‚Üí@cli.command()
   248‚Üí@click.option('--keywords', '-k', multiple=True, help='Search keywords (can specify multiple)')
   249‚Üí@click.option('--template', '-t', help='Message template name')
   250‚Üí@click.option('--var', '-v', multiple=True, help='Template variable (format: key=value)')
   251‚Üí@click.option('--company', '-c', multiple=True, help='Filter by company name (can specify multiple)')
   252‚Üí@click.option('--location', '-l', help='Filter by location')
   253‚Üí@click.option('--max-pages', '-p', type=int, default=1, help='Max pages to scrape per keyword')
   254‚Üí@click.option('--mode', '-m', type=click.Choice(['search_center', 'enterprise']), default='search_center',
   255‚Üí              help='Search mode: search_center (default) or enterprise')
   256‚Üí@click.option('--dry-run', is_flag=True, help='Search only, do not send messages')
   257‚Üí@click.option('--skip-messaged/--no-skip-messaged', default=True, help='Skip already messaged candidates')
   258‚Üí@click.option('--batch-pages', '-b', type=int, default=0, help='Send messages every N pages (0 = send after all pages)')
   259‚Üí@click.option('--interactive', '-i', is_flag=True, help='Enable interactive selector discovery when auto-detection fails')
   260‚Üí@click.option('--resume', is_flag=True, help='Resume from last checkpoint')
   261‚Üí@click.pass_context
   262‚Üídef pipeline(ctx, keywords, template, var, company, location, max_pages, mode, dry_run, skip_messaged, batch_pages, interactive, resume):
   263‚Üí    """
   264‚Üí    Search candidates and batch send messages in one command.
   265‚Üí
   266‚Üí    Combines multi-keyword search with batch messaging:
   267‚Üí    search ‚Üí preview ‚Üí confirm ‚Üí send.
   268‚Üí
   269‚Üí    Use --mode enterprise for the enterprise recruitment path with inline messaging.
   270‚Üí
   271‚Üí    Use --batch-pages to interleave search and messaging every N pages.
   272‚Üí    Example: -p 10 --batch-pages 2 searches pages 1-2, sends messages,
   273‚Üí    then pages 3-4, sends messages, etc.
   274‚Üí
   275‚Üí    Use --resume to continue from the last interrupted pipeline run.
   276‚Üí
   277‚Üí    Examples:\n
   278‚Üí        maimai pipeline -k "ÂâçÁ´ØÂ∑•Á®ãÂ∏à" -t greeting -v "recruiter_name=ÂºÝ‰∏â" -p 2\n
   279‚Üí        maimai pipeline -k "ÂâçÁ´Ø" -k "ÂêéÁ´Ø" -t greeting -v "recruiter_name=ÂºÝ‰∏â" --dry-run\n
   280‚Üí        maimai pipeline -k "ÂâçÁ´Ø" -t greeting -p 10 --batch-pages 2\n
   281‚Üí        maimai pipeline -k "ÂâçÁ´Ø" -t greeting -p 1 -i\n
   282‚Üí        maimai pipeline -k "ÁÝîÂèë" -t greeting -m enterprise -p 3\n
   283‚Üí        maimai pipeline --resume
   284‚Üí    """
   285‚Üí    from src.core.browser import get_browser_manager
   286‚Üí    from src.utils.checkpoint import CheckpointManager
   287‚Üí    from src.services.pipeline import run_pipeline_default, run_pipeline_batched, SearchMode
   288‚Üí
   289‚Üí    # Handle resume mode
   290‚Üí    if resume:
   291‚Üí        ckpt = CheckpointManager.load_latest()
   292‚Üí        if ckpt is None:
   293‚Üí            console.print("[red]No checkpoint found to resume from.[/red]")
   294‚Üí            return
   295‚Üí
   296‚Üí        from rich.panel import Panel
   297‚Üí        console.print(Panel(ckpt.summary, title="Resuming Pipeline", border_style="cyan"))
   298‚Üí
   299‚Üí        p = ckpt.params
   300‚Üí        keywords = tuple(p.get('keywords', []))
   301‚Üí        template = p.get('template', template)
   302‚Üí        variables = p.get('variables', {})
   303‚Üí        company = tuple(p.get('company', []))
   304‚Üí        location = p.get('location', location)
   305‚Üí        max_pages = p.get('max_pages', max_pages)
   306‚Üí        batch_pages = p.get('batch_pages', batch_pages)
   307‚Üí        skip_messaged = p.get('skip_messaged', skip_messaged)
   308‚Üí        interactive = p.get('interactive', interactive)
   309‚Üí        mode = p.get('mode', mode)
   310‚Üí    else:
   311‚Üí        ckpt = None
   312‚Üí        variables = _parse_variables(var)
   313‚Üí
   314‚Üí    if not keywords or not template:
   315‚Üí        console.print("[red]--keywords (-k) and --template (-t) are required (or use --resume).[/red]")
   316‚Üí        return
   317‚Üí
   318‚Üí    # Resolve SearchMode enum
   319‚Üí    search_mode = SearchMode(mode)
   320‚Üí
   321‚Üí    if search_mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE and batch_pages > 0:
   322‚Üí        console.print("[yellow]Note: --batch-pages with enterprise mode uses infinite scroll; "
   323‚Üí                      "each batch opens a fresh enterprise search. Deduplication prevents re-messaging.[/yellow]")
   324‚Üí
   325‚Üí    _apply_cdp_endpoint(ctx)
   326‚Üí
   327‚Üí    async def _pipeline():
   328‚Üí        from src.modules.auth import ensure_logged_in
   329‚Üí
   330‚Üí        reset_delay_session()
   331‚Üí        browser = get_browser_manager()
   332‚Üí        try:
   333‚Üí            await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   334‚Üí
   335‚Üí            if batch_pages > 0:
   336‚Üí                await run_pipeline_batched(
   337‚Üí                    browser, keywords, company, location,
   338‚Üí                    max_pages, batch_pages, template, variables,
   339‚Üí                    dry_run, skip_messaged, interactive, ckpt,
   340‚Üí                    mode=search_mode,
   341‚Üí                )
   342‚Üí            else:
   343‚Üí                await run_pipeline_default(
   344‚Üí                    browser, keywords, company, location,
   345‚Üí                    max_pages, template, variables,
   346‚Üí                    dry_run, skip_messaged, interactive,
   347‚Üí                    mode=search_mode,
   348‚Üí                )
   349‚Üí        finally:
   350‚Üí            await browser.close()
   351‚Üí
   352‚Üí    run_async(_pipeline())
   353‚Üí
   354‚Üí
   355‚Üí@cli.command()
   356‚Üí@click.option('--output', '-o', required=True, help='Output file path')
   357‚Üí@click.option('--format', '-f', 'fmt', type=click.Choice(['xlsx', 'csv']), default='xlsx', help='Export format')
   358‚Üí@click.option('--no-messages', is_flag=True, help='Exclude message history')
   359‚Üídef export(output, fmt, no_messages):
   360‚Üí    """
   361‚Üí    Export candidate data to Excel or CSV.
   362‚Üí
   363‚Üí    Example:
   364‚Üí        maimai export -o candidates_2026.xlsx
   365‚Üí        maimai export -o data.csv -f csv --no-messages
   366‚Üí    """
   367‚Üí    from src.modules.export import export_candidates
   368‚Üí
   369‚Üí    format_map = {'xlsx': 'excel', 'csv': 'csv'}
   370‚Üí    export_candidates(
   371‚Üí        format=format_map[fmt],
   372‚Üí        output_path=output,

   405‚Üí

   407‚Üí@cli.command()
   408‚Üídef status():
   409‚Üí    """Show current rate limit status and quota."""
   410‚Üí    try:
   411‚Üí        rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   412‚Üí
   413‚Üí        table = Table(title="Rate Limit Status")
   414‚Üí        table.add_column("Action", style="cyan")
   415‚Üí        table.add_column("Hourly Used", justify="right")
   416‚Üí        table.add_column("Hourly Limit", justify="right")
   417‚Üí        table.add_column("Daily Used", justify="right")
   418‚Üí        table.add_column("Daily Limit", justify="right")
   419‚Üí        table.add_column("Remaining", justify="right", style="green")
   420‚Üí
   421‚Üí        action_types = ['search', 'view_profile', 'send_message']
   422‚Üí        action_names = {
   423‚Üí            'search': 'Search',
   424‚Üí            'view_profile': 'Profile View',
   425‚Üí            'send_message': 'Send Message'
   426‚Üí        }
   427‚Üí
   428‚Üí        for action_type in action_types:
   429‚Üí            quota = rate_limiter.get_quota_status(action_type)
   430‚Üí            hourly = quota['hourly']
   431‚Üí            daily = quota['daily']
   432‚Üí
   433‚Üí            # Use minimum remaining
   434‚Üí            remaining = min(hourly['remaining'], daily['remaining'])
   435‚Üí
   436‚Üí            table.add_row(
   437‚Üí                action_names[action_type],
   438‚Üí                str(hourly['used']),
   439‚Üí                str(hourly['limit']),
   440‚Üí                str(daily['used']),
   441‚Üí                str(daily['limit']),
   442‚Üí                str(remaining)
   443‚Üí            )
   444‚Üí
   445‚Üí        console.print(table)
   446‚Üí
   447‚Üí        # Show adaptive throttle status
   448‚Üí        throttle = rate_limiter.throttle_factor
   449‚Üí        if throttle < 1.0:
   450‚Üí            console.print(f"\n[yellow]Adaptive throttle active: {throttle:.0%} capacity (captcha/error detected recently)[/yellow]")
   451‚Üí
   452‚Üí        # Show session info
   453‚Üí        from src.core.session import get_session_manager
   454‚Üí        session_manager = get_session_manager()
   455‚Üí        session_info = session_manager.get_session_info()
   456‚Üí
   457‚Üí        if session_info:
   458‚Üí            console.print(f"\n[dim]Session age: {session_info['age']} | Cookies: {session_info['cookie_count']}[/dim]")
   459‚Üí        else:
   460‚Üí            console.print("\n[yellow]No saved session[/yellow]")
   461‚Üí
   462‚Üí    except Exception as e:
   463‚Üí        console.print(f"[red]Error getting status: {e}[/red]")
   464‚Üí
   465‚Üí
   466‚Üí@cli.command()
   467‚Üídef logout():
   468‚Üí    """Clear saved session and log out."""
   469‚Üí    from src.core.session import get_session_manager
   470‚Üí
   471‚Üí    async def _logout():
   472‚Üí        session_manager = get_session_manager()
   473‚Üí        await session_manager.clear()
   474‚Üí        console.print("[green]Session cleared. You will need to log in again.[/green]")
   475‚Üí
   476‚Üí    run_async(_logout())
   477‚Üí
   478‚Üí
   479‚Üídef _parse_variables(var: tuple) -> dict:
   480‚Üí    """Parse key=value variable pairs from CLI option."""
   481‚Üí    variables = {}
   482‚Üí    for v in var:
   483‚Üí        if '=' in v:
   484‚Üí            key, value = v.split('=', 1)
   485‚Üí            variables[key.strip()] = value.strip()
   486‚Üí    return variables
   487‚Üí
   488‚Üí
   489‚Üídef main():
   490‚Üí    """Main entry point."""
   491‚Üí    try:
   492‚Üí        cli()
   493‚Üí    except MaimaiAssistantError as e:
   494‚Üí        console.print(f"[red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   495‚Üí        sys.exit(1)
   496‚Üí    except KeyboardInterrupt:
   497‚Üí        console.print("\n[yellow]Operation cancelled by user[/yellow]")
   498‚Üí        sys.exit(0)
   499‚Üí    except Exception as e:
   500‚Üí        console.print(f"[red]Unexpected error: {e}[/red]")
   501‚Üí        sys.exit(1)
   502‚Üí
   503‚Üí
   504‚Üíif __name__ == '__main__':
   505‚Üí    main()

1‚Üí"""Database models and setup using SQLAlchemy."""
     2‚Üí

    11‚Üí)
    12‚Üífrom sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

    15‚Üí

    17‚Üí
    18‚ÜíBase = declarative_base()
    19‚Üí
    20‚Üí
    21‚Üíclass Candidate(Base):
    22‚Üí    """Candidate model - stores candidate profile information."""
    23‚Üí
    24‚Üí    __tablename__ = 'candidates'
    25‚Üí
    26‚Üí    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)

    37‚Üí    work_experience = Column(JSON)

    39‚Üí

    43‚Üí    source_search = Column(Text)  # Search keywords that found this candidate

    45‚Üí    # Relationships

    47‚Üí
    48‚Üí    def __repr__(self):
    49‚Üí        return f"<Candidate(maimai_id='{self.maimai_id}', name='{self.name}', company='{self.company}')>"
    50‚Üí
    51‚Üí
    52‚Üíclass Message(Base):
    53‚Üí    """Message model - stores sent messages to candidates."""
    54‚Üí
    55‚Üí    __tablename__ = 'messages'
    56‚Üí
    57‚Üí    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)

    62‚Üí    retry_count = Column(Integer, default=0)

    71‚Üí

    73‚Üíclass SearchHistory(Base):

    76‚Üí    __tablename__ = 'search_history'

    85‚Üí
    86‚Üí
    87‚Üíclass ActionLog(Base):
    88‚Üí    """Action log model - tracks all actions for rate limiting."""
    89‚Üí
    90‚Üí    __tablename__ = 'action_logs'
    91‚Üí
    92‚Üí    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    93‚Üí    action_type = Column(String(50), nullable=False)  # 'search', 'view_profile', 'send_message'
    94‚Üí    timestamp = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, nullable=False)
    95‚Üí    details = Column(JSON)  # Additional action details
    96‚Üí
    97‚Üí    # Composite index for efficient rate limiting queries
    98‚Üí    __table_args__ = (
    99‚Üí        Index('idx_action_logs_type_time', 'action_type', 'timestamp'),
   100‚Üí    )
   101‚Üí
   102‚Üí    def __repr__(self):
   103‚Üí        return f"<ActionLog(id={self.id}, type='{self.action_type}', time='{self.timestamp}')>"
   104‚Üí
   105‚Üí
   106‚Üíclass DatabaseManager:
   107‚Üí    """Database manager for initialization and session management."""
   108‚Üí
   109‚Üí    def __init__(self, db_path: Optional[str] = None):
   110‚Üí        """Initialize database manager."""
   111‚Üí        if db_path is None:
   112‚Üí            config = get_config()
   113‚Üí            db_path = config.get('data.database_path', 'data/maimai.db')
   114‚Üí
   115‚Üí        # Ensure data directory exists
   116‚Üí        db_file = Path(db_path)
   117‚Üí        db_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   118‚Üí
   119‚Üí        # Create engine and session
   120‚Üí        self.db_path = db_path
   121‚Üí        self.engine = create_engine(f'sqlite:///{db_path}', echo=False)
   122‚Üí        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
   123‚Üí
   124‚Üí        # Auto-create tables and run migrations
   125‚Üí        self.init_db()
   126‚Üí
   127‚Üí        logger.info(f"Database initialized at: {db_path}")
   128‚Üí
   129‚Üí    def init_db(self):
   130‚Üí        """Create all tables and run pending migrations."""
   131‚Üí        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
   132‚Üí        logger.info("Database tables created successfully")
   133‚Üí
   134‚Üí        from src.models.migrations import run_migrations
   135‚Üí        run_migrations(self.engine)
   136‚Üí
   137‚Üí    @contextmanager
   138‚Üí    def session_scope(self):
   139‚Üí        """Provide a transactional scope with auto commit/rollback/close."""
   140‚Üí        session = self.Session()
   141‚Üí        try:
   142‚Üí            yield session
   143‚Üí            session.commit()
   144‚Üí        except Exception:
   145‚Üí            session.rollback()
   146‚Üí            raise
   147‚Üí        finally:
   148‚Üí            session.close()
   149‚Üí
   150‚Üí    def drop_all(self):
   151‚Üí        """Drop all tables (use with caution!)."""
   152‚Üí        Base.metadata.drop_all(self.engine)
   153‚Üí        logger.warning("All database tables dropped")
   154‚Üí
   155‚Üí
   156‚Üí# Global database manager instance
   157‚Üí_db_manager = None
   158‚Üí
   159‚Üí
   160‚Üídef get_db_manager() -> DatabaseManager:
   161‚Üí    """Get global database manager instance."""
   162‚Üí    global _db_manager
   163‚Üí    if _db_manager is None:
   164‚Üí        _db_manager = DatabaseManager()
   165‚Üí    return _db_manager
   166‚Üí
   167‚Üí
   168‚Üídef init_database():
   169‚Üí    """Initialize database with all tables."""
   170‚Üí    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   171‚Üí    db_manager.init_db()
   172‚Üí

1‚Üí"""Lightweight database migration system.
     2‚Üí
     3‚ÜíTracks schema versions in a dedicated table and applies incremental
     4‚Üímigrations on startup.  Each migration is a plain function that
     5‚Üíreceives a SQLAlchemy connection.
     6‚Üí"""
     7‚Üí
     8‚Üífrom typing import Callable, List, Tuple
     9‚Üí
    10‚Üífrom sqlalchemy import text, inspect
    11‚Üífrom loguru import logger
    12‚Üí
    13‚Üí
    14‚Üí# Migration registry: list of (version, description, migration_fn)
    15‚Üí# Append new migrations at the end; never reorder or remove existing entries.
    16‚Üí_migrations: List[Tuple[int, str, Callable]] = []
    17‚Üí
    18‚Üí
    19‚Üídef migration(version: int, description: str):
    20‚Üí    """Decorator to register a migration function."""
    21‚Üí    def decorator(fn: Callable):
    22‚Üí        _migrations.append((version, description, fn))
    23‚Üí        return fn
    24‚Üí    return decorator
    25‚Üí
    26‚Üí
    27‚Üí# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    28‚Üí#  Built-in migrations
    29‚Üí# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    30‚Üí
    31‚Üí@migration(1, "Initial schema ‚Äî create core tables if missing")
    32‚Üídef _m001_initial_schema(conn):
    33‚Üí    """Ensure core tables exist (safe for existing databases)."""
    34‚Üí    # SQLAlchemy create_all is called before migrations, so tables should
    35‚Üí    # already exist.  This migration just marks the baseline version.
    36‚Üí    pass
    37‚Üí
    38‚Üí
    39‚Üí@migration(2, "Add retry_count column to messages table")
    40‚Üídef _m002_messages_retry_count(conn):
    41‚Üí    inspector = inspect(conn)
    42‚Üí    columns = [c["name"] for c in inspector.get_columns("messages")]
    43‚Üí    if "retry_count" not in columns:
    44‚Üí        conn.execute(text("ALTER TABLE messages ADD COLUMN retry_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0"))
    45‚Üí
    46‚Üí
    47‚Üí# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    48‚Üí#  Migration runner
    49‚Üí# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    50‚Üí
    51‚Üídef _ensure_version_table(conn) -> None:
    52‚Üí    """Create the schema_version table if it doesn't exist."""
    53‚Üí    conn.execute(text("""
    54‚Üí        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_version (
    55‚Üí            version INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    56‚Üí            description TEXT NOT NULL,
    57‚Üí            applied_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    58‚Üí        )
    59‚Üí    """))
    60‚Üí    conn.commit()
    61‚Üí
    62‚Üí
    63‚Üídef _current_version(conn) -> int:
    64‚Üí    """Return highest applied migration version, or 0 if none."""
    65‚Üí    result = conn.execute(text("SELECT MAX(version) FROM schema_version"))
    66‚Üí    row = result.fetchone()
    67‚Üí    return row[0] or 0 if row else 0
    68‚Üí
    69‚Üí
    70‚Üídef run_migrations(engine) -> None:
    71‚Üí    """Apply all pending migrations against *engine*.
    72‚Üí
    73‚Üí    Called automatically by DatabaseManager.init_db().
    74‚Üí    """
    75‚Üí    with engine.connect() as conn:
    76‚Üí        _ensure_version_table(conn)
    77‚Üí        current = _current_version(conn)
    78‚Üí
    79‚Üí        pending = [(v, d, fn) for v, d, fn in _migrations if v > current]
    80‚Üí        if not pending:
    81‚Üí            logger.debug(f"Database schema is up-to-date (version {current})")
    82‚Üí            return
    83‚Üí
    84‚Üí        for version, description, fn in sorted(pending):
    85‚Üí            logger.info(f"Applying migration v{version}: {description}")
    86‚Üí            fn(conn)
    87‚Üí            conn.execute(
    88‚Üí                text("INSERT INTO schema_version (version, description) VALUES (:v, :d)"),
    89‚Üí                {"v": version, "d": description},
    90‚Üí            )
    91‚Üí            conn.commit()
    92‚Üí
    93‚Üí        final = _current_version(conn)
    94‚Üí        logger.info(f"Migrations complete ‚Äî schema version {final}")
    95‚Üí

1‚Üí"""Custom exceptions for Maimai Assistant."""
     2‚Üí
     3‚Üí
     4‚Üíclass MaimaiAssistantError(Exception):
     5‚Üí    """Base exception for all Maimai Assistant errors."""
     6‚Üí    pass
     7‚Üí
     8‚Üí
     9‚Üíclass BrowserError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    10‚Üí    """Raised when browser automation fails."""
    11‚Üí    pass
    12‚Üí
    13‚Üí
    14‚Üíclass SessionExpiredError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    15‚Üí    """Raised when Maimai session has expired."""
    16‚Üí    pass
    17‚Üí
    18‚Üí
    19‚Üíclass RateLimitExceededError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    20‚Üí    """Raised when rate limit is exceeded."""
    21‚Üí
    22‚Üí    def __init__(self, action_type: str, wait_time: int, message: str = None):
    23‚Üí        self.action_type = action_type
    24‚Üí        self.wait_time = wait_time
    25‚Üí        if message is None:
    26‚Üí            message = f"Rate limit exceeded for {action_type}. Wait {wait_time} seconds."
    27‚Üí        super().__init__(message)
    28‚Üí
    29‚Üí
    30‚Üíclass SelectorNotFoundError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    31‚Üí    """Raised when page selector is not found."""
    32‚Üí    pass
    33‚Üí
    34‚Üí
    35‚Üíclass ExtractionError(MaimaiAssistantError):
    36‚Üí    """Raised when data extraction fails."""
    37‚Üí    pass
    38‚Üí
    39‚Üí
    40‚Üí

1‚Üí"""Configuration loader and manager."""
     2‚Üí
     3‚Üíimport json
     4‚Üífrom pathlib import Path
     5‚Üífrom typing import Any, Dict
     6‚Üí
     7‚Üífrom loguru import logger
     8‚Üí
     9‚Üífrom src.exceptions.errors import ConfigurationError
    10‚Üí
    11‚Üí
    12‚Üíclass Config:
    13‚Üí    """Configuration manager for Maimai Assistant."""
    14‚Üí
    15‚Üí    def __init__(self, config_dir: str = "config"):
    16‚Üí        self.config_dir = Path(config_dir)
    17‚Üí        self._settings: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    18‚Üí        self._selectors: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    19‚Üí        self._message_templates: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    20‚Üí
    21‚Üí        self._load_all()
    22‚Üí
    23‚Üí    def _load_json(self, filename: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    24‚Üí        """Load JSON configuration file."""
    25‚Üí        filepath = self.config_dir / filename
    26‚Üí        try:
    27‚Üí            with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    28‚Üí                return json.load(f)
    29‚Üí        except FileNotFoundError:
    30‚Üí            raise ConfigurationError(f"Configuration file not found: {filepath}")
    31‚Üí        except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
    32‚Üí            raise ConfigurationError(f"Invalid JSON in {filepath}: {e}")
    33‚Üí
    34‚Üí    def _load_all(self):
    35‚Üí        """Load all configuration files."""
    36‚Üí        logger.info("Loading configuration files...")
    37‚Üí        self._settings = self._load_json("settings.json")
    38‚Üí        self._selectors = self._load_json("selectors.json")
    39‚Üí        self._message_templates = self._load_json("message_templates.json")
    40‚Üí        logger.info("Configuration loaded successfully")
    41‚Üí
    42‚Üí    def get(self, key: str, default: Any = None) -> Any:
    43‚Üí        """Get setting by dot-notation key (e.g., 'browser.headless')."""
    44‚Üí        keys = key.split('.')
    45‚Üí        value = self._settings
    46‚Üí
    47‚Üí        for k in keys:
    48‚Üí            if isinstance(value, dict):
    49‚Üí                value = value.get(k)
    50‚Üí                if value is None:
    51‚Üí                    return default
    52‚Üí            else:
    53‚Üí                return default
    54‚Üí
    55‚Üí        return value
    56‚Üí
    57‚Üí    def get_selector(self, selector_path: str) -> str:
    58‚Üí        """Get selector by dot-notation path (e.g., 'search.keyword_input')."""
    59‚Üí        keys = selector_path.split('.')
    60‚Üí        value = self._selectors.get('selectors', {})
    61‚Üí
    62‚Üí        for k in keys:
    63‚Üí            if isinstance(value, dict):
    64‚Üí                value = value.get(k)
    65‚Üí                if value is None:
    66‚Üí                    raise ConfigurationError(f"Selector not found: {selector_path}")
    67‚Üí            else:
    68‚Üí                raise ConfigurationError(f"Invalid selector path: {selector_path}")
    69‚Üí
    70‚Üí        return value
    71‚Üí
    72‚Üí    def get_template(self, template_name: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    73‚Üí        """Get message template by name."""
    74‚Üí        template = self._message_templates.get(template_name)
    75‚Üí        if template is None:
    76‚Üí            raise ConfigurationError(f"Message template not found: {template_name}")
    77‚Üí        return template
    78‚Üí
    79‚Üí    def list_templates(self) -> list:
    80‚Üí        """List all available message template names."""
    81‚Üí        return list(self._message_templates.keys())
    82‚Üí
    83‚Üí
    84‚Üí# Global configuration instance
    85‚Üí_config_instance = None
    86‚Üí
    87‚Üí
    88‚Üídef get_config() -> Config:
    89‚Üí    """Get global configuration instance."""
    90‚Üí    global _config_instance
    91‚Üí    if _config_instance is None:
    92‚Üí        _config_instance = Config()
    93‚Üí    return _config_instance
    94‚Üí
    95‚Üí
    96‚Üí

1‚Üí"""Rate limiter for preventing account bans."""
     2‚Üí
     3‚Üíimport asyncio
     4‚Üífrom datetime import datetime, timedelta
     5‚Üífrom typing import Tuple, Optional
     6‚Üí
     7‚Üífrom loguru import logger
     8‚Üífrom sqlalchemy import func
     9‚Üí
    10‚Üífrom src.models.database import ActionLog, get_db_manager, DatabaseManager
    11‚Üífrom src.utils.config import get_config, Config
    12‚Üífrom src.exceptions.errors import RateLimitExceededError
    13‚Üí
    14‚Üí
    15‚Üíclass RateLimiter:
    16‚Üí    """Rate limiter for controlling action frequency.
    17‚Üí
    18‚Üí    Supports adaptive throttling: when captchas or errors are reported,
    19‚Üí    limits are temporarily tightened to reduce detection risk.
    20‚Üí    """
    21‚Üí
    22‚Üí    def __init__(self, config: Optional[Config] = None, db_manager: Optional[DatabaseManager] = None):
    23‚Üí        """Initialize rate limiter with configuration.
    24‚Üí
    25‚Üí        Args:
    26‚Üí            config: Config instance (uses global singleton if None)
    27‚Üí            db_manager: DatabaseManager instance (uses global singleton if None)
    28‚Üí        """
    29‚Üí        self.config = config or get_config()
    30‚Üí        self.db_manager = db_manager or get_db_manager()
    31‚Üí
    32‚Üí        # Adaptive throttle state
    33‚Üí        self._throttle_factor: float = 1.0  # 1.0 = normal, <1.0 = stricter
    34‚Üí        self._captcha_timestamps: list = []
    35‚Üí        self._error_timestamps: list = []
    36‚Üí
    37‚Üí    def report_captcha(self) -> None:
    38‚Üí        """Report a captcha occurrence to trigger adaptive throttling."""
    39‚Üí        now = datetime.utcnow()
    40‚Üí        self._captcha_timestamps.append(now)
    41‚Üí        # Keep only last 30 minutes of captcha events
    42‚Üí        cutoff = now - timedelta(minutes=30)
    43‚Üí        self._captcha_timestamps = [t for t in self._captcha_timestamps if t >= cutoff]
    44‚Üí        self._update_throttle_factor()
    45‚Üí
    46‚Üí    def report_error(self) -> None:
    47‚Üí        """Report a request error/failure to trigger adaptive throttling."""
    48‚Üí        now = datetime.utcnow()
    49‚Üí        self._error_timestamps.append(now)
    50‚Üí        cutoff = now - timedelta(minutes=30)
    51‚Üí        self._error_timestamps = [t for t in self._error_timestamps if t >= cutoff]
    52‚Üí        self._update_throttle_factor()
    53‚Üí
    54‚Üí    def _update_throttle_factor(self) -> None:
    55‚Üí        """Recalculate throttle factor based on recent captcha/error frequency.
    56‚Üí
    57‚Üí        Throttle factor ranges from 1.0 (normal) to 0.3 (heavily throttled).
    58‚Üí        - 1 captcha in 30min: reduce to 0.7x (30% fewer operations allowed)
    59‚Üí        - 2 captchas: reduce to 0.5x
    60‚Üí        - 3+ captchas: reduce to 0.3x
    61‚Üí        - Errors contribute at half the weight of captchas
    62‚Üí        """
    63‚Üí        captcha_count = len(self._captcha_timestamps)
    64‚Üí        error_count = len(self._error_timestamps)
    65‚Üí        combined = captcha_count + error_count * 0.5
    66‚Üí
    67‚Üí        if combined >= 3:
    68‚Üí            self._throttle_factor = 0.3
    69‚Üí        elif combined >= 2:
    70‚Üí            self._throttle_factor = 0.5
    71‚Üí        elif combined >= 1:
    72‚Üí            self._throttle_factor = 0.7
    73‚Üí        else:
    74‚Üí            self._throttle_factor = 1.0
    75‚Üí
    76‚Üí        if self._throttle_factor < 1.0:
    77‚Üí            logger.warning(
    78‚Üí                f"Adaptive throttle active: factor={self._throttle_factor:.1f} "
    79‚Üí                f"(captchas={captcha_count}, errors={error_count} in last 30min)"
    80‚Üí            )
    81‚Üí
    82‚Üí    def _refresh_throttle(self) -> None:
    83‚Üí        """Prune expired timestamps and recalculate throttle factor."""
    84‚Üí        cutoff = datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(minutes=30)
    85‚Üí        self._captcha_timestamps = [t for t in self._captcha_timestamps if t >= cutoff]
    86‚Üí        self._error_timestamps = [t for t in self._error_timestamps if t >= cutoff]
    87‚Üí        self._update_throttle_factor()
    88‚Üí
    89‚Üí    @property
    90‚Üí    def throttle_factor(self) -> float:
    91‚Üí        """Current adaptive throttle factor (1.0 = normal, <1.0 = throttled)."""
    92‚Üí        return self._throttle_factor
    93‚Üí
    94‚Üí    def _get_limits(self, action_type: str) -> Tuple[int, int, int]:
    95‚Üí        """
    96‚Üí        Get rate limits for an action type, adjusted by adaptive throttle.
    97‚Üí
    98‚Üí        Args:
    99‚Üí            action_type: Type of action ('search', 'view_profile', 'send_message')
   100‚Üí
   101‚Üí        Returns:
   102‚Üí            Tuple of (per_hour_limit, per_day_limit, min_interval_seconds)
   103‚Üí        """
   104‚Üí        action_map = {
   105‚Üí            'search': ('search_per_hour', 'search_per_day'),
   106‚Üí            'view_profile': ('profile_view_per_hour', 'profile_view_per_day'),
   107‚Üí            'send_message': ('message_per_hour', 'message_per_day'),
   108‚Üí        }
   109‚Üí
   110‚Üí        if action_type not in action_map:
   111‚Üí            raise ValueError(f"Unknown action type: {action_type}")
   112‚Üí
   113‚Üí        hour_key, day_key = action_map[action_type]
   114‚Üí
   115‚Üí        per_hour = self.config.get(f'rate_limits.{hour_key}', 20)
   116‚Üí        per_day = self.config.get(f'rate_limits.{day_key}', 100)
   117‚Üí        min_interval = self.config.get('rate_limits.min_interval_seconds', 30)
   118‚Üí
   119‚Üí        # Apply adaptive throttle: reduce limits and increase interval
   120‚Üí        per_hour = max(1, int(per_hour * self._throttle_factor))
   121‚Üí        per_day = max(1, int(per_day * self._throttle_factor))
   122‚Üí        if self._throttle_factor < 1.0:
   123‚Üí            min_interval = int(min_interval / self._throttle_factor)
   124‚Üí
   125‚Üí        return per_hour, per_day, min_interval
   126‚Üí
   127‚Üí    def _count_actions(self, action_type: str, since: datetime) -> int:
   128‚Üí        """
   129‚Üí        Count actions of a type since a given time.
   130‚Üí
   131‚Üí        Args:
   132‚Üí            action_type: Type of action
   133‚Üí            since: Count actions since this time
   134‚Üí
   135‚Üí        Returns:
   136‚Üí            Number of actions
   137‚Üí        """
   138‚Üí        with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   139‚Üí            count = session.query(func.count(ActionLog.id)).filter(
   140‚Üí                ActionLog.action_type == action_type,
   141‚Üí                ActionLog.timestamp >= since
   142‚Üí            ).scalar()
   143‚Üí
   144‚Üí            return count or 0
   145‚Üí
   146‚Üí    def _get_last_action_time(self, action_type: Optional[str] = None) -> Optional[datetime]:
   147‚Üí        """
   148‚Üí        Get timestamp of last action.
   149‚Üí
   150‚Üí        Args:
   151‚Üí            action_type: Type of action, or None for any action
   152‚Üí
   153‚Üí        Returns:
   154‚Üí            Timestamp of last action, or None if no actions
   155‚Üí        """
   156‚Üí        with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   157‚Üí            query = session.query(func.max(ActionLog.timestamp))
   158‚Üí
   159‚Üí            if action_type:
   160‚Üí                query = query.filter(ActionLog.action_type == action_type)
   161‚Üí
   162‚Üí            last_time = query.scalar()
   163‚Üí            return last_time
   164‚Üí
   165‚Üí    def check_rate_limit(self, action_type: str) -> None:
   166‚Üí        """
   167‚Üí        Check if action is allowed under rate limits.
   168‚Üí
   169‚Üí        Args:
   170‚Üí            action_type: Type of action to check
   171‚Üí
   172‚Üí        Raises:
   173‚Üí            RateLimitExceededError: If rate limit is exceeded
   174‚Üí        """
   175‚Üí        self._refresh_throttle()
   176‚Üí        per_hour, per_day, min_interval = self._get_limits(action_type)
   177‚Üí
   178‚Üí        now = datetime.utcnow()
   179‚Üí        one_hour_ago = now - timedelta(hours=1)
   180‚Üí        one_day_ago = now - timedelta(days=1)
   181‚Üí
   182‚Üí        # Check hourly limit
   183‚Üí        hourly_count = self._count_actions(action_type, one_hour_ago)
   184‚Üí        if hourly_count >= per_hour:
   185‚Üí            # Calculate wait time until oldest action expires
   186‚Üí            with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   187‚Üí                oldest_in_window = session.query(ActionLog.timestamp).filter(
   188‚Üí                    ActionLog.action_type == action_type,
   189‚Üí                    ActionLog.timestamp >= one_hour_ago
   190‚Üí                ).order_by(ActionLog.timestamp.asc()).first()
   191‚Üí
   192‚Üí                if oldest_in_window:
   193‚Üí                    wait_until = oldest_in_window[0] + timedelta(hours=1)
   194‚Üí                    wait_seconds = int((wait_until - now).total_seconds())
   195‚Üí                else:
   196‚Üí                    wait_seconds = 3600
   197‚Üí
   198‚Üí            raise RateLimitExceededError(
   199‚Üí                action_type=action_type,
   200‚Üí                wait_time=wait_seconds,
   201‚Üí                message=f"Hourly rate limit exceeded for {action_type}. "
   202‚Üí                        f"Limit: {per_hour}/hour. Wait {wait_seconds // 60} minutes."
   203‚Üí            )
   204‚Üí
   205‚Üí        # Check daily limit
   206‚Üí        daily_count = self._count_actions(action_type, one_day_ago)
   207‚Üí        if daily_count >= per_day:
   208‚Üí            with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   209‚Üí                oldest_in_window = session.query(ActionLog.timestamp).filter(
   210‚Üí                    ActionLog.action_type == action_type,
   211‚Üí                    ActionLog.timestamp >= one_day_ago
   212‚Üí                ).order_by(ActionLog.timestamp.asc()).first()
   213‚Üí
   214‚Üí                if oldest_in_window:
   215‚Üí                    wait_until = oldest_in_window[0] + timedelta(days=1)
   216‚Üí                    wait_seconds = int((wait_until - now).total_seconds())
   217‚Üí                else:
   218‚Üí                    wait_seconds = 86400
   219‚Üí
   220‚Üí            raise RateLimitExceededError(
   221‚Üí                action_type=action_type,
   222‚Üí                wait_time=wait_seconds,
   223‚Üí                message=f"Daily rate limit exceeded for {action_type}. "
   224‚Üí                        f"Limit: {per_day}/day. Wait {wait_seconds // 3600} hours."
   225‚Üí            )
   226‚Üí
   227‚Üí        # Check minimum interval
   228‚Üí        last_action = self._get_last_action_time()
   229‚Üí        if last_action:
   230‚Üí            elapsed = (now - last_action).total_seconds()
   231‚Üí            if elapsed < min_interval:
   232‚Üí                wait_seconds = int(min_interval - elapsed)
   233‚Üí                raise RateLimitExceededError(
   234‚Üí                    action_type='any',
   235‚Üí                    wait_time=wait_seconds,
   236‚Üí                    message=f"Minimum interval not met. Wait {wait_seconds} seconds."
   237‚Üí                )
   238‚Üí
   239‚Üí        logger.debug(f"Rate limit check passed for {action_type}")
   240‚Üí
   241‚Üí    def log_action(self, action_type: str, details: Optional[dict] = None) -> None:
   242‚Üí        """
   243‚Üí        Log an action to the database.
   244‚Üí
   245‚Üí        Args:
   246‚Üí            action_type: Type of action
   247‚Üí            details: Optional action details
   248‚Üí        """
   249‚Üí        with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   250‚Üí            action_log = ActionLog(
   251‚Üí                action_type=action_type,
   252‚Üí                timestamp=datetime.utcnow(),
   253‚Üí                details=details or {}
   254‚Üí            )
   255‚Üí            session.add(action_log)
   256‚Üí
   257‚Üí        logger.debug(f"Logged action: {action_type}")
   258‚Üí
   259‚Üí    def get_quota_status(self, action_type: str) -> dict:
   260‚Üí        """
   261‚Üí        Get current quota status for an action type.
   262‚Üí
   263‚Üí        Args:
   264‚Üí            action_type: Type of action
   265‚Üí
   266‚Üí        Returns:
   267‚Üí            Dictionary with quota information
   268‚Üí        """
   269‚Üí        per_hour, per_day, _ = self._get_limits(action_type)
   270‚Üí
   271‚Üí        now = datetime.utcnow()
   272‚Üí        one_hour_ago = now - timedelta(hours=1)
   273‚Üí        one_day_ago = now - timedelta(days=1)
   274‚Üí
   275‚Üí        hourly_used = self._count_actions(action_type, one_hour_ago)
   276‚Üí        daily_used = self._count_actions(action_type, one_day_ago)
   277‚Üí
   278‚Üí        return {
   279‚Üí            'action_type': action_type,
   280‚Üí            'hourly': {
   281‚Üí                'used': hourly_used,
   282‚Üí                'limit': per_hour,
   283‚Üí                'remaining': max(0, per_hour - hourly_used)
   284‚Üí            },
   285‚Üí            'daily': {
   286‚Üí                'used': daily_used,
   287‚Üí                'limit': per_day,
   288‚Üí                'remaining': max(0, per_day - daily_used)
   289‚Üí            }
   290‚Üí        }
   291‚Üí
   292‚Üí
   293‚Üíasync def async_check_rate_limit(action_type: str) -> None:
   294‚Üí    """
   295‚Üí    Check rate limit, waiting through any violations until the action is allowed.
   296‚Üí
   297‚Üí    Blocks until the rate limit clears ‚Äî never raises RateLimitExceededError.
   298‚Üí
   299‚Üí    Args:
   300‚Üí        action_type: Type of action to check
   301‚Üí    """
   302‚Üí    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   303‚Üí    while True:
   304‚Üí        try:
   305‚Üí            rate_limiter.check_rate_limit(action_type)
   306‚Üí            return
   307‚Üí        except RateLimitExceededError as e:
   308‚Üí            wait = e.wait_time + 1  # +1s buffer
   309‚Üí            logger.info(f"Rate limit hit: {e}. Waiting {wait}s before retrying...")
   310‚Üí            await asyncio.sleep(wait)
   311‚Üí
   312‚Üí
   313‚Üí# Global rate limiter instance
   314‚Üí_rate_limiter = None
   315‚Üí
   316‚Üí
   317‚Üídef get_rate_limiter() -> RateLimiter:
   318‚Üí    """Get global rate limiter instance."""
   319‚Üí    global _rate_limiter
   320‚Üí    if _rate_limiter is None:
   321‚Üí        _rate_limiter = RateLimiter()
   322‚Üí    return _rate_limiter
   323‚Üí

1‚Üí"""Database models and setup using SQLAlchemy."""
     2‚Üí
     3‚Üífrom contextlib import contextmanager
     4‚Üífrom datetime import datetime
     5‚Üífrom pathlib import Path
     6‚Üífrom typing import Optional
     7‚Üí
     8‚Üífrom sqlalchemy import (
     9‚Üí    Column, Integer, String, Text, DateTime, JSON,
    10‚Üí    ForeignKey, create_engine, Index, CheckConstraint
    11‚Üí)
    12‚Üífrom sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
    13‚Üífrom sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
    14‚Üífrom loguru import logger
    15‚Üí
    16‚Üífrom src.utils.config import get_config
    17‚Üí
    18‚ÜíBase = declarative_base()
    19‚Üí
    20‚Üí
    21‚Üíclass Candidate(Base):
    22‚Üí    """Candidate model - stores candidate profile information."""
    23‚Üí
    24‚Üí    __tablename__ = 'candidates'
    25‚Üí
    26‚Üí    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    27‚Üí    maimai_id = Column(String(50), unique=True, nullable=False, index=True)
    28‚Üí    name = Column(String(100))
    29‚Üí    title = Column(String(200))
    30‚Üí    company = Column(String(200))
    31‚Üí    location = Column(String(100))
    32‚Üí    profile_url = Column(Text)
    33‚Üí
    34‚Üí    # JSON fields for structured data
    35‚Üí    basic_info = Column(JSON)
    36‚Üí    education = Column(JSON)
    37‚Üí    work_experience = Column(JSON)
    38‚Üí    skills = Column(JSON)
    39‚Üí
    40‚Üí    # Metadata
    41‚Üí    first_seen = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    42‚Üí    last_updated = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow)
    43‚Üí    source_search = Column(Text)  # Search keywords that found this candidate
    44‚Üí
    45‚Üí    # Relationships
    46‚Üí    messages = relationship("Message", back_populates="candidate")
    47‚Üí
    48‚Üí    def __repr__(self):
    49‚Üí        return f"<Candidate(maimai_id='{self.maimai_id}', name='{self.name}', company='{self.company}')>"
    50‚Üí
    51‚Üí
    52‚Üíclass Message(Base):
    53‚Üí    """Message model - stores sent messages to candidates."""
    54‚Üí
    55‚Üí    __tablename__ = 'messages'
    56‚Üí
    57‚Üí    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    58‚Üí    candidate_maimai_id = Column(String(50), ForeignKey('candidates.maimai_id'), index=True)
    59‚Üí    template_name = Column(String(100))
    60‚Üí    content = Column(Text, nullable=False)
    61‚Üí    status = Column(String(20), CheckConstraint("status IN ('sent', 'failed', 'cancelled')"))
    62‚Üí    retry_count = Column(Integer, default=0)

    69‚Üí    def __repr__(self):
    70‚Üí        return f"<Message(id={self.id}, candidate_id='{self.candidate_maimai_id}', status='{self.status}')>"

    73‚Üíclass SearchHistory(Base):
    74‚Üí    """Search history model - tracks all searches performed."""

    76‚Üí    __tablename__ = 'search_history'

    78‚Üí    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)

    85‚Üí
    86‚Üí
    87‚Üíclass ActionLog(Base):
    88‚Üí    """Action log model - tracks all actions for rate limiting."""
    89‚Üí
    90‚Üí    __tablename__ = 'action_logs'
    91‚Üí
    92‚Üí    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    93‚Üí    action_type = Column(String(50), nullable=False)  # 'search', 'view_profile', 'send_message'
    94‚Üí    timestamp = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, nullable=False)
    95‚Üí    details = Column(JSON)  # Additional action details
    96‚Üí
    97‚Üí    # Composite index for efficient rate limiting queries
    98‚Üí    __table_args__ = (
    99‚Üí        Index('idx_action_logs_type_time', 'action_type', 'timestamp'),
   100‚Üí    )
   101‚Üí
   102‚Üí    def __repr__(self):
   103‚Üí        return f"<ActionLog(id={self.id}, type='{self.action_type}', time='{self.timestamp}')>"
   104‚Üí
   105‚Üí
   106‚Üíclass DatabaseManager:
   107‚Üí    """Database manager for initialization and session management."""
   108‚Üí
   109‚Üí    def __init__(self, db_path: Optional[str] = None):
   110‚Üí        """Initialize database manager."""
   111‚Üí        if db_path is None:
   112‚Üí            config = get_config()
   113‚Üí            db_path = config.get('data.database_path', 'data/maimai.db')
   114‚Üí
   115‚Üí        # Ensure data directory exists
   116‚Üí        db_file = Path(db_path)
   117‚Üí        db_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   118‚Üí
   119‚Üí        # Create engine and session
   120‚Üí        self.db_path = db_path
   121‚Üí        self.engine = create_engine(f'sqlite:///{db_path}', echo=False)
   122‚Üí        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
   123‚Üí
   124‚Üí        # Auto-create tables and run migrations
   125‚Üí        self.init_db()
   126‚Üí
   127‚Üí        logger.info(f"Database initialized at: {db_path}")
   128‚Üí
   129‚Üí    def init_db(self):
   130‚Üí        """Create all tables and run pending migrations."""
   131‚Üí        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
   132‚Üí        logger.info("Database tables created successfully")
   133‚Üí
   134‚Üí        from src.models.migrations import run_migrations
   135‚Üí        run_migrations(self.engine)
   136‚Üí
   137‚Üí    @contextmanager
   138‚Üí    def session_scope(self):
   139‚Üí        """Provide a transactional scope with auto commit/rollback/close."""
   140‚Üí        session = self.Session()
   141‚Üí        try:
   142‚Üí            yield session
   143‚Üí            session.commit()
   144‚Üí        except Exception:
   145‚Üí            session.rollback()
   146‚Üí            raise
   147‚Üí        finally:
   148‚Üí            session.close()
   149‚Üí
   150‚Üí    def drop_all(self):
   151‚Üí        """Drop all tables (use with caution!)."""
   152‚Üí        Base.metadata.drop_all(self.engine)
   153‚Üí        logger.warning("All database tables dropped")
   154‚Üí
   155‚Üí
   156‚Üí# Global database manager instance
   157‚Üí_db_manager = None
   158‚Üí
   159‚Üí
   160‚Üídef get_db_manager() -> DatabaseManager:
   161‚Üí    """Get global database manager instance."""
   162‚Üí    global _db_manager
   163‚Üí    if _db_manager is None:
   164‚Üí        _db_manager = DatabaseManager()
   165‚Üí    return _db_manager
   166‚Üí
   167‚Üí
   168‚Üídef init_database():
   169‚Üí    """Initialize database with all tables."""
   170‚Üí    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   171‚Üí    db_manager.init_db()
   172‚Üí

1‚Üí"""Shared captcha detection utility.
     2‚Üí
     3‚ÜíDetects captcha elements on page and pauses for manual resolution.
     4‚ÜíUsed by auth and search modules.
     5‚Üí"""
     6‚Üí
     7‚Üíimport sys
     8‚Üí
     9‚Üífrom patchright.async_api import Page
    10‚Üífrom loguru import logger
    11‚Üífrom rich.console import Console
    12‚Üí
    13‚Üíconsole = Console()
    14‚Üí
    15‚ÜíCAPTCHA_SELECTORS = [
    16‚Üí    '[class*="captcha"]',
    17‚Üí    '[class*="verify"]',
    18‚Üí    '[id*="captcha"]',
    19‚Üí    '[class*="slider"]',
    20‚Üí    '[class*="geetest"]',
    21‚Üí    'iframe[src*="captcha"]',
    22‚Üí]
    23‚Üí
    24‚Üí
    25‚Üíasync def check_captcha(page: Page, report_to_rate_limiter: bool = False) -> None:
    26‚Üí    """Detect captcha elements on page and pause for manual resolution.
    27‚Üí
    28‚Üí    Args:
    29‚Üí        page: Playwright page instance
    30‚Üí        report_to_rate_limiter: If True, report captcha to adaptive rate limiter
    31‚Üí    """
    32‚Üí    for selector in CAPTCHA_SELECTORS:
    33‚Üí        try:
    34‚Üí            elem = await page.query_selector(selector)
    35‚Üí            if elem and await elem.is_visible():
    36‚Üí                if report_to_rate_limiter:
    37‚Üí                    from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter
    38‚Üí                    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
    39‚Üí                    rate_limiter.report_captcha()
    40‚Üí
    41‚Üí                console.print("[bold red]Captcha detected! Please solve it in the browser window.[/bold red]")
    42‚Üí                console.print("[dim]Press Enter here after solving the captcha...[/dim]")
    43‚Üí                sys.stdin.readline()
    44‚Üí                await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
    45‚Üí                return
    46‚Üí        except Exception:
    47‚Üí            continue
    48‚Üí

1‚Üí"""Random delay generators for human-like behavior simulation.
     2‚Üí
     3‚ÜíUses log-normal distribution instead of uniform for more realistic timing.
     4‚ÜíIncludes fatigue simulation (delays increase over session duration) and
     5‚Üírandom "distraction" pauses to mimic real human behavior.
     6‚Üí"""
     7‚Üí
     8‚Üíimport math
     9‚Üíimport random
    10‚Üíimport asyncio
    11‚Üíimport time
    12‚Üífrom loguru import logger
    13‚Üífrom src.utils.config import get_config
    14‚Üí
    15‚Üí
    16‚Üí# Session start time for fatigue calculation
    17‚Üí_session_start: float = time.monotonic()
    18‚Üí
    19‚Üí# Action counter for distraction triggers
    20‚Üí_action_count: int = 0
    21‚Üí
    22‚Üí
    23‚Üídef _reset_session():
    24‚Üí    """Reset session tracking. Call at the start of each CLI command."""
    25‚Üí    global _session_start, _action_count
    26‚Üí    _session_start = time.monotonic()
    27‚Üí    _action_count = 0
    28‚Üí
    29‚Üí
    30‚Üídef reset_session():
    31‚Üí    """Public API: reset fatigue/distraction tracking for a new command invocation."""
    32‚Üí    _reset_session()
    33‚Üí
    34‚Üí
    35‚Üídef _lognormal_delay(min_val: float, max_val: float) -> float:
    36‚Üí    """Generate a log-normal distributed delay between min and max.
    37‚Üí
    38‚Üí    Log-normal produces a right-skewed distribution: most delays are
    39‚Üí    near the low end, with occasional longer pauses ‚Äî matching human behavior.
    40‚Üí    """
    41‚Üí    # Map min/max to log-normal mu/sigma
    42‚Üí    mid = (min_val + max_val) / 2
    43‚Üí    mu = math.log(mid)
    44‚Üí    sigma = 0.4  # Controls spread; 0.4 gives moderate variance
    45‚Üí    delay = random.lognormvariate(mu, sigma)
    46‚Üí    return max(min_val, min(delay, max_val * 1.5))
    47‚Üí
    48‚Üí
    49‚Üídef _fatigue_multiplier() -> float:
    50‚Üí    """Calculate fatigue multiplier based on session duration.
    51‚Üí
    52‚Üí    Humans slow down over time. After 30 minutes, delays increase by ~20%.
    53‚Üí    After 1 hour, by ~40%. Caps at 1.6x.
    54‚Üí    """
    55‚Üí    elapsed_minutes = (time.monotonic() - _session_start) / 60.0
    56‚Üí    if elapsed_minutes < 10:
    57‚Üí        return 1.0
    58‚Üí    # Gradual ramp: 1.0 at 10min ‚Üí ~1.6 at 90min
    59‚Üí    factor = 1.0 + 0.006 * min(elapsed_minutes - 10, 100)
    60‚Üí    return min(factor, 1.6)
    61‚Üí
    62‚Üí
    63‚Üídef _maybe_distraction_pause() -> float:
    64‚Üí    """Occasionally return a long "distraction" pause.
    65‚Üí
    66‚Üí    About 3% chance of a 5-30 second pause (simulating checking phone,
    67‚Üí    reading something, etc.). Returns 0 most of the time.
    68‚Üí    """
    69‚Üí    global _action_count
    70‚Üí    _action_count += 1
    71‚Üí
    72‚Üí    # Don't trigger on first few actions
    73‚Üí    if _action_count < 5:
    74‚Üí        return 0.0
    75‚Üí
    76‚Üí    if random.random() < 0.03:
    77‚Üí        pause = random.uniform(5.0, 30.0)
    78‚Üí        logger.debug(f"Simulating distraction pause: {pause:.1f}s")
    79‚Üí        return pause
    80‚Üí    return 0.0
    81‚Üí
    82‚Üí
    83‚Üídef _time_of_day_multiplier() -> float:
    84‚Üí    """Adjust delays based on time of day.
    85‚Üí
    86‚Üí    Late night (23:00-07:00): slower (1.3x) ‚Äî fewer people browse late.
    87‚Üí    Peak hours (10:00-12:00, 14:00-17:00): normal (1.0x).
    88‚Üí    Other times: slightly slower (1.1x).
    89‚Üí    """
    90‚Üí    import datetime
    91‚Üí    hour = datetime.datetime.now().hour
    92‚Üí
    93‚Üí    if 23 <= hour or hour < 7:
    94‚Üí        return 1.3
    95‚Üí    elif (10 <= hour <= 12) or (14 <= hour <= 17):
    96‚Üí        return 1.0
    97‚Üí    else:
    98‚Üí        return 1.1
    99‚Üí
   100‚Üí
   101‚Üídef get_random_delay(delay_type: str = 'action') -> float:
   102‚Üí    """
   103‚Üí    Get a random delay based on configured ranges.
   104‚Üí
   105‚Üí    Uses log-normal distribution with fatigue, distraction, and
   106‚Üí    time-of-day adjustments for realistic human behavior.
   107‚Üí
   108‚Üí    Args:
   109‚Üí        delay_type: Type of delay - 'page_load', 'action', 'typing', 'scroll', 'message'
   110‚Üí
   111‚Üí    Returns:
   112‚Üí        Random delay in seconds
   113‚Üí    """
   114‚Üí    config = get_config()
   115‚Üí
   116‚Üí    delay_ranges = {
   117‚Üí        'page_load': (
   118‚Üí            config.get('delays.page_load_min', 2),
   119‚Üí            config.get('delays.page_load_max', 5)
   120‚Üí        ),
   121‚Üí        'action': (
   122‚Üí            config.get('delays.action_min', 0.5),
   123‚Üí            config.get('delays.action_max', 2.0)
   124‚Üí        ),
   125‚Üí        'typing': (
   126‚Üí            config.get('delays.typing_min', 0.05),
   127‚Üí            config.get('delays.typing_max', 0.15)
   128‚Üí        ),
   129‚Üí        'scroll': (
   130‚Üí            config.get('delays.scroll_min', 0.5),
   131‚Üí            config.get('delays.scroll_max', 1.5)
   132‚Üí        ),
   133‚Üí        'message': (
   134‚Üí            config.get('delays.action_min', 0.5),
   135‚Üí            config.get('delays.action_max', 2.0)
   136‚Üí        ),
   137‚Üí    }
   138‚Üí
   139‚Üí    min_delay, max_delay = delay_ranges.get(delay_type, (0.5, 2.0))
   140‚Üí
   141‚Üí    # Use log-normal instead of uniform
   142‚Üí    base_delay = _lognormal_delay(min_delay, max_delay)
   143‚Üí
   144‚Üí    # Apply fatigue (typing is exempt ‚Äî fatigue doesn't affect keystroke speed much)
   145‚Üí    if delay_type != 'typing':
   146‚Üí        base_delay *= _fatigue_multiplier()
   147‚Üí        base_delay *= _time_of_day_multiplier()
   148‚Üí
   149‚Üí    # Add possible distraction pause for non-typing delays
   150‚Üí    if delay_type in ('action', 'page_load', 'message'):
   151‚Üí        base_delay += _maybe_distraction_pause()
   152‚Üí
   153‚Üí    return base_delay
   154‚Üí
   155‚Üí
   156‚Üíasync def async_random_delay(delay_type: str = 'action'):
   157‚Üí    """
   158‚Üí    Asynchronous version of get_random_delay.
   159‚Üí
   160‚Üí    Args:
   161‚Üí        delay_type: Type of delay - 'page_load', 'action', 'typing', 'scroll', 'message'
   162‚Üí    """
   163‚Üí    delay = get_random_delay(delay_type)
   164‚Üí    await asyncio.sleep(delay)
   165‚Üí
   166‚Üí
   167‚Üí
   168‚Üídef get_retry_delay(attempt: int, base_delay: float = 1.0, max_delay: float = 60.0) -> float:
   169‚Üí    """
   170‚Üí    Calculate exponential backoff delay for retries.
   171‚Üí
   172‚Üí    Args:
   173‚Üí        attempt: Current retry attempt number (0-indexed)
   174‚Üí        base_delay: Base delay in seconds
   175‚Üí        max_delay: Maximum delay cap
   176‚Üí
   177‚Üí    Returns:
   178‚Üí        Delay in seconds with jitter
   179‚Üí    """
   180‚Üí    # Exponential backoff: base * 2^attempt
   181‚Üí    delay = min(base_delay * (2 ** attempt), max_delay)
   182‚Üí
   183‚Üí    # Add jitter (¬±25%)
   184‚Üí    jitter = delay * random.uniform(-0.25, 0.25)
   185‚Üí    return max(0, delay + jitter)
   186‚Üí
